name: Josh Hawley
subject: Have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow Conservative,
Big tech has been allowed to censor conservatives for FAR TOO LONG.

I don’t know about you, but **I’m sick of hearing the liberal Fake News media say whatever they want to, while conservatives are silenced, simply for having a different opinion.**

I’m vowing to step up and investigate these Big tech abuses ASAP, **but I need your help NOW.**

Will you stand with me and fight against Big tech and the radical Left? [**Stand with me now. >>>**](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=a2e23cefd1ec477ab9de064f3de0a64a&_e=6fr7_WSUzNS74P2WW0expKve79SIJGUI9G3YynJxNH0zJVGBambjPnoL3PR6yaR-F6glcHGCHEwb483FAHCqS6uzJQ6PM-8cqgsNtLsg-ksc__h2K2qqKJq6AO6P76un6W_s-9Pjtdr7JvELzUSz_gw4N1WO0P_IPwRxd-gVuk98Gg7na1Z6vuQyBgGUnbTEG91aZjzQlFyBaETt8cP1kMPSm-vIhZCBhTwjzUh-cNmyI9UXkMzUnTjx4qtkDrAO3yB7z1wrOTgHS-eUs1Ua_J-7Mb9sZds58STNeAhZ9eWtBqyo2ovCfWoboI_YIm11y42M9F2vGg6yHS_FatplbMDFrLlD8rRK2sCQqWCzA0dlDX4msR5Bjfk5PLR5o9nAwOz1ZURM8caEYd7hxacrqFU1P2gmoutrm_0souwVmkQ%3D)

body:
now’s our chance to stop them!
| **FIRST:** Republicans seized control of the House, jeopardizing President Biden’s agenda, abortion rights, and all of Democrats’ incredible progress over the years.

**BUT THEN:** The MAGA mob descended into _total chaos_ ...they’re so busy tearing each other to pieces, _they FAILED to elect a Speaker for the first time in 100 years!_

**SO NOW:** We’re seizing this opportunity to organize and win back the House for Democrats in 2024...**but we’re still TRAILING our $15,000 goal!**

Republican infighting has left them more vulnerable than EVER. So it’s critical that we mobilize every resource at our disposal _right now_ to END their far-right reign! [Our must-hit deadline expires at MIDNIGHT! The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. subject: Sign the card for our Democratic representatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto, John Fetterman, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and the entire Democratic caucus would love to see your name on this card. Add your name today to send along your warm wishes. | |
---
This week, we watched Vice President Harris swear in our United States senators -- including Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto, John Fetterman, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and more -- securing our Democratic Senate majority. It was the culmination of years of hard work, and grassroots support made it all possible. **[As we begin the new year, will you take a moment to sign our card welcoming the 118th Congress and pass along your warm wishes? clean_body: Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto, John Fetterman, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and the entire Democratic caucus would love to see your name on this card. Add your name today to send along your warm wishes. | | This week, we watched Vice President Harris swear in our United States senators -- including Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto, John Fetterman, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and more -- securing our Democratic Senate majority. It was the culmination of years of hard work, and grassroots support made it all possible. We’re so grateful you’ve supported our party over these last few years. Donations from grassroots supporters helped elect President Biden, a Democratic Senate majority (twice), and Democrats up and down the ballot. Since then, we’ve accomplished a lot together. We’re sure that Democrats will appreciate knowing you have their backs as they're sworn in. Will you show your support by signing your name? | | Over the last two years under Democratic majorities, Congressional Democrats and President Biden delivered for the American people. **And Democrats came back to Washington, D.C. this year prepared to build on our successes.** So as House Republicans continue to try to elect a Speaker, we wait to govern. **Here is my bottom line:** Republicans won the majority in the House fair and square. That means it is their right to elect a new Speaker. But, it is also their _responsibility_ to elect a Speaker — after all, when you win, it is your turn to lead. It is the prize you win, and sometimes, the price you pay. I will continue to join my Democratic colleagues in our steadfast, unified support of Hakeem Jeffries for Speaker, as I am confident he can provide the steadfast leadership the House needs in these unprecedented times. House Democrats stand ready to keep working for the American people. We are just waiting on our Republican counterparts to get their act together. **Here is my promise to you: no matter who eventually becomes Speaker of the House I will never stop fighting for working clean_body: | | | | Over the last two years under Democratic majorities, Congressional Democrats and President Biden delivered for the American people. And Democrats came back to Washington, D.C. this year prepared to build on our successes. So as House Republicans continue to try to elect a Speaker, we wait to govern. Here is my bottom line: Republicans won the majority in the House fair and square. That means it is their right to elect a new Speaker. But, it is also their responsibility to elect a Speaker — after all, when you win, it is your turn to lead. It is the prize you win, and sometimes, the price you pay. I will continue to join my Democratic colleagues in our steadfast, unified support of Hakeem Jeffries for Speaker, as I am confident he can provide the steadfast leadership the House needs in these unprecedented times. House Democrats stand ready to keep working for the American people. We are just waiting on our Republican counterparts to get their act together. Here is my promise to you: no matter who eventually becomes Speaker of the House I will never stop fighting for working families in Northwest Washington and across the country. Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Laura Loomer
subject: Watch them all run!
body:
I've been in the Swamp this week as Congress is unable to function as they attempt to choose the next Speaker of the House. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FldOnSZOaFbIJxWZMQZL1zg%2Fm9ecvvtIivLlW4FI5Frwcw/1/01000185848a6ad0-ec3e1987-a2a5-490d-a628-796504a09756-000000/B4aNSij656NnszgnHCFTdB0f1ss=303) | Dear Friend,

[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FldOnSZOaFbIJxWZMQZL1zg%2Fm9ecvvtIivLlW4FI5Frwcw/2/01000185848a6ad0-ec3e1987-a2a5-490d-a628-796504a09756-000000/JGO4-MFaYDEop0eTRWqiwapCjUg=303) I've been in the Swamp this week as Congress is unable to function as they attempt to choose the next Speaker of the House.

Establishment swamp creature Kevin McCarthy is growing more frustrated with each round of voting as 20 patriot GOP politicians continue to block him from controlling Congress.

So, I flew out to add some fuel to the fire by tracking down members of Congress and D.C. politicos to ask them about corrupt McCarthy.

I ran into AOC first! When she saw me, she literally swerved and said, "Oh no!" I walked faster and caught up to her and asked her if Congress should investigate Kevin McCarthy's use of stolen and illegal FTX funds against America First candidates in their primaries. **[Watch AOC as she dodges me, here.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FldOnSZOaFbIJxWZMQZL1zg%2Fm9ecvvtIivLlW4FI5Frwcw/3/01000185848a6ad0-ec3e1987-a2a5-490d-a628-796504a09756-000000/vRq4_D9nlj_Urbr6-zQkFQsmntk=303)**

And yes, McCarthy was one of many politicians who benefited from the theft of billions of dollars of FTX crypto.

Next up was Nancy Pelosi's #2, Steny Hoyer. He stepped up the pace after shaking my hand and realizing who I was.

He had no comment about McCarthy's acceptance of, and use of, stolen FTX funds.

And then, outside of the popular Republican hangout, the Capitol Hill Club, I found idiot swamp pollster Frank Luntz, who is also Kevin McCarthy's "roommate". Literally!

Luntz talked into his speakerphone, and as I asked him questions about Kevin McCarthy, he had his goons try and knock my phone out of my hand and called over a police officer to try and get rid of me. [**Watch Frank get LOOMERED, here.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FldOnSZOaFbIJxWZMQZL1zg%2Fm9ecvvtIivLlW4FI5Frwcw/4/01000185848a6ad0-ec3e1987-a2a5-490d-a628-796504a09756-000000/h02XJLk20kD_8Pg3Whg5LQ2L5bU=303)

**Why are they all so scared?**

Well, here's the truth. They thought they got rid of me.

From cancelling me on social media to illegally interfering with my Congressional campaigns, they thought I would give up and go away.

Nope. Not even close.

Today, I now know even more about Washington and the corruption behind it, and I'm determined to expose them all.

They are screwed, and they know it.

So, **[join me as I get back to holding their feet to the fire](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FldOnSZOaFbIJxWZMQZL1zg%2Fm9ecvvtIivLlW4FI5Frwcw/5/01000185848a6ad0-ec3e1987-a2a5-490d-a628-796504a09756-000000/ApEFfgdg5-YlwOjUJ_3MZ4uNLm8=303)** while I take on both the Communist Left and the Anti-American, Establishment Republican, UNIPARTY cabal.

As we're seeing in Congress right now with only a small group of patriots holding back the entire Republican Establishment from destroying our country with the radical Left, we can do the same by exposing them with hard-hitting gonzo journalism and never letting up.

[**Please donate today to help cover my work travel and video editing costs while I remain in D.C. to keep tracking down and exposing all of the swamp monsters.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FldOnSZOaFbIJxWZMQZL1zg%2Fm9ecvvtIivLlW4FI5Frwcw/6/01000185848a6ad0-ec3e1987-a2a5-490d-a628-796504a09756-000000/t9cQ5CvSRbjAwLUcekut5laGK9w=303)

And stay tuned for more!

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Be sure you're [**following my Twitter here.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FSHsKe763xg8929kTv83kSs8nfA%2Fm9ecvvtIivLlW4FI5Frwcw/1/01000185848a6ad0-ec3e1987-a2a5-490d-a628-796504a09756-000000/lCBFvcn9871xhh2RGf9O4HRWnbc=303)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: The Status Quo is the Problem!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_status_quo_is_the_problem&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The status quo is the problem. **Congress doesn't listen to "We the People" anymore. They measure success by how much they can fundraise, which means they are beholden to Special Interests and lobbyists with deep pockets.** The Washington Insiders believe Kevin McCarthy has earned the prestigious position of Speaker of the House. But what has he delivered for our country in the over decade long he's been in leadership positions??? Kevin McCarthy IS the status quo! If there were a scoreboard for the Washington status quo, it would be this: We're $13.5 Trillion dollars in the hole!!! That number is so large, it needs to be broken down to something we can grasp. Your share of the debt caused by the Washington "Status Quo" is:
## $246,886!!!
You are on the hook for a quarter of a million dollars because Washington Insiders like Kevin McCarthy have no interest in what is good for you. They care about what's good for the Special Interests and lobbyists of the Swamp. But this isn't only a Washington problem. We have this same issue in St Paul... There is a record budget surplus. Minnesota's government has overtaxed us by over $17 Billion. Per taxpayer, that is more than $6,000 that you are owed back. We don't have that money in our pockets today - not just because of the Democrats - we don't have it because of **sell out Republicans** who spent $2 Billion last year along side with the Democrats and didn't give a penny of it back. You're led to believe by political pundits and the corporate media that there are two different Parties and they are world's apart. **I think you and I woke up to that lie many years ago.** The reality is that politicians on both sides of the aisle only care about getting re-elected. There is no incentive for them to solve problems, because then there's nothing for them to run on. So they'll continue the facade of a fight, while delivering the goodies for their buddies in Special Interest. And along the way, they're destroying the economic prosperity of future generations. The status quo of Washington D.C. and St Paul IS THE PROBLEM! I find energy in what the 20 conservatives in the US Congress are doing right now. It's time for a change! **That's why we focused our shows this week on this historic event.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfLwMVuMaYY1kIyrPRoNEq_7pMD9MKVJBOw7CeA5-iy6drg1am_6c_giX9mMvXxg1moDtYP4-dlf3mK2zPmEal7M&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_status_quo_is_the_problem&n=2) Luckily, we don't need to be in Washington D.C. to help the effort to STOP the status quo.... We can do A LOT from right here in Minnesota. There's a real battle for our liberties taking place RIGHT NOW in St Paul. Action 4 Liberty is prepared to BRING THE HEAT on politicians who attack our liberties. The Status Quo of St Paul wants to continue with COVID era mandates and extend them to the child immunization schedule The Status Quo of St Paul wants to spend every penny of the surplus on more bloated government. And the Status Quo of St Paul wants to continue infringing on our right to keep and bear arms. **There's no compromise with those seeking to infringe on our God-given rights. That's a losing game!** So we will continue fighting to disrupt the status quo of anti-liberty, reckless spending, self-serving politicians in St Paul. It won't be easy. Nothing worth pursing is! I will need your help over the next couple months to mount a MASSIVE resistance to the St Paul Status Quo. **Please reach deep into your pocket and help us out with a donation today. Help us FIGHT the Status Quo. Help us PROTECT your liberties before they are lost!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_status_quo_is_the_problem&n=3 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_status_quo_is_the_problem&n=3)
---
Thanks in advance!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_status_quo_is_the_problem&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_status_quo_is_the_problem&n=5).

We don't have that money in our pockets today - not just because of the Democrats - we don't have it because of sell out Republicans who spent $2 Billion last year along side with the Democrats and didn't give a penny of it back. You're led to believe by political pundits and the corporate media that there are two different Parties and they are world's apart. I think you and I woke up to that lie many years ago. The reality is that politicians on both sides of the aisle only care about getting re-elected. There is no incentive for them to solve problems, because then there's nothing for them to run on. So they'll continue the facade of a fight, while delivering the goodies for their buddies in Special Interest. And along the way, they're destroying the economic prosperity of future generations. The status quo of Washington D.C. and St Paul IS THE PROBLEM! I find energy in what the 20 conservatives in the US Congress are doing right now. It's time for a change! That's why we focused our shows this week on this historic event. Luckily, we don't need to be in Washington D.C. to help the effort to STOP the status quo.... We can do A LOT from right here in Minnesota. There's a real battle for our liberties taking place RIGHT NOW in St Paul. Action 4 Liberty is prepared to BRING THE HEAT on politicians who attack our liberties. The Status Quo of St Paul wants to continue with COVID era mandates and extend them to the child immunization schedule The Status Quo of St Paul wants to spend every penny of the surplus on more bloated government. And the Status Quo of St Paul wants to continue infringing on our right to keep and bear arms. There's no compromise with those seeking to infringe on our God-given rights. That's a losing game! So we will continue fighting to disrupt the status quo of anti-liberty, reckless spending, self-serving politicians in St Paul. It won't be easy. Nothing worth pursing is! I will need your help over the next couple months to mount a MASSIVE resistance to the St Paul Status Quo. Please reach deep into your pocket and help us out with a donation today. Help us FIGHT the Status Quo. Help us PROTECT your liberties before they are lost! | "DONATE NOW!" Thanks in advance! In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: D’oh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
They don’t care about working people, period.
#
Derek,
Trust me when I say, I wish we could make this week all about celebrating what we accomplished together in PA.
I still can’t quite believe that just two days ago, I was sworn in as PA’s Junior U.S. Senator. It’s the honor and privilege of a lifetime.
**But we’ve gotta take a sec to talk about the clown behavior in the other chamber of Congress. 🤡**
Basically, 20 far-right GOP members are refusing to vote with the rest of their party. They’ve literally called a vote 11 TIMES and counting without choosing a Speaker...which means Congress can’t get anything done.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230105-2?refcode=em20230105-2-8199&refcode2=8199_434096_QsrUF_&akid=8199%2E434096%2EQsrUF_)
Elected Republicans couldn’t make it more clear, Derek. They don’t care that they’re wasting time while working people struggle with inflation, below-living wages, + other urgent problems.**They don’t care about working people, period.**
**Ridiculous BS like this is exactly why I ran for U.S. Senate in the first place.****[If you’re tired of the GOP’s BS + dysfunction, it would mean a lot to me if you could chip in $5 to support my work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230105-2?refcode=em20230105-2-8199&refcode2=8199_434096_QsrUF_&akid=8199%2E434096%2EQsrUF_)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230105-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230105-8199&refcode2=8199_434096_QsrUF_&akid=8199%2E434096%2EQsrUF_)**
I can’t wait to get actual work done with our Democratic Senate majority, Derek — especially if it’ll help us take back the House from these clowns in 2024.
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230105-8199-footer&t=1&refcode2=8199_434096_QsrUF_&akid=8199%2E434096%2EQsrUF_)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8199%2E434096%2EQsrUF_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8199%2E434096%2EQsrUF_)

clean_body: They don’t care about working people, period. Derek, Trust me when I say, I wish we could make this week all about celebrating what we accomplished together in PA. I still can’t quite believe that just two days ago, I was sworn in as PA’s Junior U.S. Senator. It’s the honor and privilege of a lifetime. But we’ve gotta take a sec to talk about the clown behavior in the other chamber of Congress. 🤡 Basically, 20 far-right GOP members are refusing to vote with the rest of their party. They’ve literally called a vote 11 TIMES and counting without choosing a Speaker...which means Congress can’t get anything done. Elected Republicans couldn’t make it more clear, Derek. They don’t care that they’re wasting time while working people struggle with inflation, below-living wages, + other urgent problems.They don’t care about working people, period. Ridiculous BS like this is exactly why I ran for U.S. Senate in the first place. I can’t wait to get actual work done with our Democratic Senate majority, Derek — especially if it’ll help us take back the House from these clowns in 2024. More soon, John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: chaos and silver linings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chaos23_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- Tomorrow marks the second anniversary of a day that lives in infamy \-- the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol. Donald Trump incited a violent mob to stop the counting of the electoral votes, and to "help" Mike Pence find some "courage" to overturn the election. It was one of the saddest days our democracy has ever experienced, and certainly was the lowest point of my 12 years in Congress. But Trump and his mob ultimately failed - thank God! In the silver lining of that chaos was the awakening and gathering of so many good, reasonable people who realized we must defend democracy and stand for truth together if we don't want to lose both. Together, our movement succeeded at defeating many extreme candidates in the 2022 primary and general elections, and we're just getting started. The past few days has been another profile in chaos -- brought about by Kevin McCarthy reaping the harvest of the poisoned seeds he's sewn. How ironic that the man who'd sell his soul to have his Speaker wishes come true, can't put the MAGA genie back in the bottle. Be careful what you wish for, Kevin! Meanwhile, the rest of us are just wishing for a Congress that wants to solve problems; for politicians who care more about doing a job than keeping their job; and leaders who will put Country over Party. | [](https://www.country1st.com/2023wish?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chaos23_nd&n=2 "Share Your Wish for Our Democracy in '23") [Share Your Wish for Our Democracy in '23](https://www.country1st.com/2023wish?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chaos23_nd&n=2)
---
But this doesn't have to be a fantasy. The choices before us aren't just stay the same or get worse. Country first _is_ the Reasonable Majority; we are the heroes coming to our own rescue; the ones future generations will thank someday.
Now it won't be easy. We see the chaos in Congress now; we know it's not going away with the snap of a finger. But much like January 6th, this Chaos Congress will be the siren that wakes up even more reasonable people, from all across the political spectrum. And when that happens, there's no way the Reasonable can't overcome the Extremes.
[](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chaos23_nd&n=3 "Support Our Critical Mission") [Support Our Critical Mission](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chaos23_nd&n=3)
---
This movement has bold, never-before-seen plans for 2023 (which we're excited to share very soon), and I've never been more sure that a shift is coming -- brought about by good, reasonable people like you. So stay tuned -- it's going to be awesome; all the more so because you're part of it.
Country First (and Happy New Year!),
Adam
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chaos23_nd&n=4 "Wear Your Values") [Wear Your Values](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chaos23_nd&n=4)
---

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wp2%2ffF4qJv5smQGbLXxGBg&sysid=1)
---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655856%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mkSt0phpGfMsptVpbzM%2fLg&sysid=1)
---
| That’s right - as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them ..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street - the man who believes in NOTHING - receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655857%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DHdY6CQ6%2fgUUGm3FZY1%2f7Q&sysid=1) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655858%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V5XmmE4X%2bUCGqDGUmcKg%2bw&sysid=1)
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655859%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gjXwR5lSYYNdOBMY0l2EHQ&sysid=1) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655850%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8q9Q01Oy4NKH%2bitREXhb3A&sysid=1)
---
|

**Thanks for fighting with me,**
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wp2%2ffF4qJv5smQGbLXxGBg&sysid=1)
---
| _**Matt Gaetz**_ _**Republican, Florida's 1st District**_
---
|
---

subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjb51b4s8hlb827i8qn1nevrocs4ubjbflasjrrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g64o76cph2bs)
---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1j71u57du9v7f993scarb9q9rsl40n2vp8d9m78_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g64o76cph2bs "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY")
---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztnj2gtbu0k1f6sa9laie15pe8ll3ljoqhsqo0q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g64o76cph2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvari5n4vnk6ttkfv9asj2otdg73jlculckhupcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g64o76cph2bs "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqg1rl8k37rrns1n70vhck34s9b8i01l155pg5r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g64o76cph2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgteb65kcek9211n5ar9rthteo7v4h4c6p6qruhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g64o76cph2bs "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.")
---
|

**Thanks for fighting with me,**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgg5i11es53icab03tlbk7tqevhb3pgil473a24g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g64o76cph2bs)

body:
I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3bk72ke5h5l1ouk3aiil0r6912gg1n138tmmqjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g66ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z98lqs24sl6pi61800s7dsbebmusba2g9eidp76g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g66ob2cjh2bs "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY")
---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqop9tgj6bnjpomgl0tpqjt6mqgqae6fmmr2qfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g66ob2cjh2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjg92sa8raefef0vfutk42sparkfkobfj4cof020_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g66ob2cjh2bs "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5bpvjukrejd9rbe0a0r0jhcik916fgf0v6rhl70_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1g66ob2cjh2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.

name: Vice President Mike Pence
subject: Here's what really happened, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America Committee
body:
| |
---
| | | _**The rioters had reached our floor.**_

What really happened on January 6th? In my new book, So Help Me God, I share every detail of that day and the events that took place in our nation's capital.

---
**" I was not afraid, but I was angry. I was angry at what I saw, how it desecrated the seat of our democracy and dishonored the patriotism of millions of our supporters, who would never do such a thing here or anywhere else. To see fellow Americans ransacking the Capitol left me with a simmering indignation and the thought: Not here, not this... not in America."**

_So Help Me God_ , by Mike Pence
---

_**[Get your copy today>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62166985:6lOCvvGIN:m:1:3331421248:2604C38C929487E48F973FCAD8A64D9D:r "Get your copy today >>")**_

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: All hell is breaking loose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

All hell is breaking loose in the D.C. swamp.

That's because I stayed true to my word and nominated Donald J. Trump for Speaker of the House.

_Kevin McCarthy 's failed on 11 straight ballots_.

I'm holding the line.

**But I need to know if the MAGA movement is with me in this fight to STOP McCarthy and support Trump for Speaker.**

**[Click here to chip in and help me elect Speaker Donald J. Trump](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r) **[DONALD TRUMP FOR SPEAKER
❯❯ CHIP IN $20.23 TODAY ❮❮ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r)** **Donald Trump fought to build the wall and secure our border.**

Kevin McCarthy pushed for amnesty and strutted around the United States House of Representatives wearing a Ukrainian flag pin.

Donald Trump puts America first.

_Kevin McCarthy puts the swamp first_.

For the last 14 years, Kevin McCarthy held a seat at the table where the establishment cut deals that ballooned the national debt to 31 trillion dollars, eroded our freedoms and opened our borders to a mass illegal alien invasion.

I've stood on the House floor and stopped Kevin McCarthy on ballot after ballot.

And now that I've nominated Trump for Speaker, the swamp is fighting back with all its fury.

**_RINOs smear me in the fake news._**

The establishment threatened primary challenges.

McCarthy is running robocalls attacking me.

**I must fight to get the message out immediately that electing Kevin McCarthy is continuing the Mitch McConnell/Nancy Pelosi swamp business as usual.**

**[So please, stand with me in the fight to stop Kevin McCarthy and support Donald Trump for Speaker of the House by chipping in today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r).**
**[HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN BELOW TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r)** [** -> CHIP IN $10 **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r) [** -> CHIP IN $20.23 **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r) [** -> CHIP IN $50 **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r) [** -> CHIP IN $100 **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r) [** -> CHIP IN $250 **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r) [** -> CHIP IN NOW **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61351137:s6XMOlDgN:m:1:2365227053:FD6DD3CF59C4CDD98CD91CFB674F0CCA:r) **Sincerely,**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: There’s a 4-3 right-wing majority on Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, which allowed 2022 voter suppression efforts to remain in place, and protected the most absurd gerrymander in the country. Fortunately, one of the right wing hack judges is leaving the court. On February 18th there’s an open primary, with the top-two vote getters running in the general election in April.
body:
Wisconsin State Supreme Court seat up for grabs
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50a0f35c-9f61-42ba-9e4c-6f0a48f5a38c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Perhaps the most important election of the year is less than six weeks away. In Wisconsin--one of the two or three closest swing states in the country--there will be a primary for Wisconsin Supreme Court._** _Why is this so important? Let us count the ways: Right now Wisconsin has a 4-3 right-wing Court majority. This allowed voter suppression efforts to remain in place in 2022, including a ban on absentee-ballot drop boxes and closing polling places in disproportionately minority neighborhoods. Additionally, it protected the most absurd gerrymander in the country. Democratic Governor Tony Evers won his race 51-48%. Yet, Republicans won a two thirds supermajority in the WI senate and missed one in the WI assembly by one vote. _ **_Thankfully, one of the right wing hack judges is leaving the court. This will lead to an open primary February 18th, with the top-two vote getters running in the general election in April. We must elect a Democrat, _**_and in an ideal world we'd elect both Democrats in the primary, ensuring the eventual general election winner--and a new Wisconsin Supreme Court majority--is progressive and respects democracy._ [**Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to candidate Judge Janet Protasiewicz or Judge Everett Mitchell, or both? Wouldn’t it be wonderful if we could guarantee a good result based on the primary?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc76b0167-6b69-4cf4-966e-1968a41ca0c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T321f83c4-c2de-451d-a25e-0770990ab3fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_With the betrayal of Roe. Wade by a stolen majority of religious zealots on the U.S. Supreme Court, Wisconsin's Court will decide if an 1849 state law banning abortion is constitutional. There's no mystery here--if Republicans win they'll have a 4-3 majority to ban abortion in virtually all cases, including rape, incest and the life of the mother._**_ _ _Therefore, we must fund both progressive candidates, Dane County Judge Everett Mitchell & Milwaukee County Judge Janet Protasiewicz. Even more so as reporting has been done showing the secretive authoritarian Federalist Society--the same group of goons that saddled SCOTUS with the likes of Thomas, Alito, Kavanaugh and the rest--started dropping large amounts of cash into state court races. Sadly, it allowed them to take back both Ohio and North Carolina courts this past election cycle, and we have not yet begun to see the damage this will do._ **_We cannot lose this race in Wisconsin. It'll even have presidential implications, with WI being a key state we must win in 2024 to hold the White House. In other words, to stop a cruel, corrupt and incompetent Trump, DeSantis, Ted Cruz type from being handed the state with voter suppression or other election thievery_. ** **[Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to candidate Judge Janet Protasiewicz or Judge Everett Mitchell, or both? Wouldn’t it be wonderful if we could guarantee a good result based on the primary?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4d28ac7-ec0d-4aa2-9876-a500dd02afa2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** Thank you for helping us protect our democracy in Wisconsin and the entire county. Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82d946ca-5432-4d0b-9885-8e74bbc1dc13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/wisconsinsupremecourtrace4-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10b50225-589c-47aa-9de0-7291a1bbafad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Our children need to hear this: Do not let fear rule your life
body:

| Peter \-
Last month, we emailed you about the Passaic School District's decision to reinstate masks for our children in schools - a decision that will be disastrous for our kids' education.
Just this week, another radical school district took the same step and is mandating that ALL students must wear masks in class.
Students in Patterson will be FORCED to mask up to attend classes, which serves no purpose other than to stunt their education, inhibit their social skills, and make them live in fear.
Parents across the state have had enough. They're fighting back against these harmful mandates, and we're joining them in this fight.
Sign our petition TODAY to tell school boards and teachers unions here in the Garden State that we REFUSE to let them muzzle our kids this school year or ANY year.
[SIGN THE PETITION TODAY TO SAY "NO!" TO MASKING OUR CHILDREN IN NJ SCHOOLS!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013kw6N2pUjbqS8cHFPMW5sL5_adBs1CQCFZoUdkP696i6BDiRWu5M9HktMbEql3dmwleJT_rMm39e2-KHbMgbW_bmiMbiBX7osY-qYcEbFHuWAdG38ZUc2dlXlRlLA5-5Za0rRIy4VCwEAaH3CS4r6cjzitCd06tVf1iRhQVSTXA_Mxz0-ZQwupHirEyHH0E4POuIY9vHb8FosdGxxcL86AZbAoM_u2KQ3_zYn7SuAuBlc4XefJafzGJtQ_neEJX6Zt_TLjd_9IhwIs60WK2tRPOe19yw9-821SIATjFhX2iBqQDxLlklcvVnZY-hKNuerVK3JahyMZHa21BumBTLwGy3HSGvXKuNtWsoEwbAnA0=&c=Rtn2LLV3LMSPRYwfmnJUz56aHVQdqOe0Ff-bTUeAA3IncUpR-JTCLQ==&ch=-U55XqK4w9fGimbWehH-iac3mdoAY_I73yhU2x2lRIY9_K-In73Dwg==)

subject: Two years ago today

body:
We cannot for one minute take our democracy for granted. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56970868/386476646/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMxMDBhYi1jYjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4A3ri1EgTUNfFHXhSjNZzwDb6frHUJNs8L4c3Fa5IeI=&emci=9ac312e8-c28d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=473100ab-cb8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Exactly two years ago today, I sat in my office in the Vermont Statehouse and watched the footage of violent crowds attacking the U.S. Capitol. I’d just been sworn in as the President Pro Tempore in the Vermont Senate, and in an instant, my elation and excitement turned to heartache and horror. Today, we remember the five police officers who lost their lives, and the more than 140 who were injured defending our democracy. I will never forget the heroism of the officers who protected the People’s House that day. The insurgency in D.C. took place just a few hours after Vermont Senators gathered at our own Statehouse in Montpelier to be officially sworn into office. We came together as Vermonters, not as members of different political parties. When we were sworn in, we all took the identical oath of office – a hallowed promise to uphold and defend the constitution of our state and our nation. In the hours, days and weeks that followed the insurrection, I felt hopeful that there would be a true reckoning over what had happened – and to some degree, there has been: After over a year of rigorous investigation, the bipartisan House Select Committee on January 6 followed the facts, reviewed the evidence, and recently issued four criminal referrals of Donald Trump to the Department of Justice – concluding that he intentionally misled and provoked the insurrectionists as part of an attempt to stay in power after losing the 2020 election. While these criminal referrals are a step in the right direction, our work is far from finished. **We cannot for one minute take our democracy for granted.** The anti-democratic forces unleashed and amplified by the former President continue to define his party, and make the future of democracy in America more uncertain than ever. That’s why House Democrats delivered the bipartisan Electoral Count Reform Act and enacted record election security funding. And it’s why we’re fighting for more action to strengthen our elections. As I sit in the same building that came under siege two years ago today, I am more committed than ever to defending our democracy, holding the line for our values, and fighting for truth, transparency, and accountability on behalf of all Vermonters. Yours, Becca Balint
---

* * *

Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. **Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to serve Vermont in Congress. **If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56970877/386476654/-702467740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMxMDBhYi1jYjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4A3ri1EgTUNfFHXhSjNZzwDb6frHUJNs8L4c3Fa5IeI=&emci=9ac312e8-c28d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=473100ab-cb8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yduqSyHWDE20n1Ms6JOWpw2?unsubscribedata=oOE735Ptik709IFTK3LGF7VARV9jfk0A8zWM1ciYlu9Ma%2BtGYPKnXxPrKeRm9jUaOFywsRX5mWXrtuuDueHZxrBMJ70y2A4ej91JxMQJfv2o%2BFc4GSD2v2JdajvBrVHsOQFlTJjMTyioLFh2Q4bZ4ohrVT3gqzSpuEMsTPrRlk%2FmFf1NANkHjWKtU%2B3BqBEajENJtLpelCRHIyOkPRpkNM7wSKYnB%2F56RoBlH9al2k7TQYSiNgIOkrYP0sLLIrBTZbhN%2Ftd7hEjGfqXx7lpPEGyDda6Qr5K1KkpbnhbpJKW61YDM5pROYGlRNV9j4hUcDsxig45s9%2FuW%2BXf87Q4XgB2alQsw5YlLWj9FCHeQY3BtFJgk4cvXxeWjqRxLWnCjzWRMQs3nrjYJPBoxTDGIkrpTe9qsCblLSAFkk3iWg5Tc9OyOp09bCDDYlCrEmIpD). If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P.O. Box 291, Burlington, VT, 05402

I’d just been sworn in as the President Pro Tempore in the Vermont Senate, and in an instant, my elation and excitement turned to heartache and horror. Today, we remember the five police officers who lost their lives, and the more than 140 who were injured defending our democracy. I will never forget the heroism of the officers who protected the People’s House that day. The insurgency in D.C. took place just a few hours after Vermont Senators gathered at our own Statehouse in Montpelier to be officially sworn into office. We came together as Vermonters, not as members of different political parties. When we were sworn in, we all took the identical oath of office – a hallowed promise to uphold and defend the constitution of our state and our nation. In the hours, days and weeks that followed the insurrection, I felt hopeful that there would be a true reckoning over what had happened – and to some degree, there has been: After over a year of rigorous investigation, the bipartisan House Select Committee on January 6 followed the facts, reviewed the evidence, and recently issued four criminal referrals of Donald Trump to the Department of Justice – concluding that he intentionally misled and provoked the insurrectionists as part of an attempt to stay in power after losing the 2020 election. While these criminal referrals are a step in the right direction, our work is far from finished. We cannot for one minute take our democracy for granted. The anti-democratic forces unleashed and amplified by the former President continue to define his party, and make the future of democracy in America more uncertain than ever. That’s why House Democrats delivered the bipartisan Electoral Count Reform Act and enacted record election security funding. And it’s why we’re fighting for more action to strengthen our elections. As I sit in the same building that came under siege two years ago today, I am more committed than ever to defending our democracy, holding the line for our values, and fighting for truth, transparency, and accountability on behalf of all Vermonters. ---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you 'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdg5hcaq06u6pc9plj42jb9env6v9cqvsrio3a70_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1i6cor6c1h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven 't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkf8smr7peiqhn9a451r9nkg07j6t32kv3gon8fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1i6cor6c1h2bs)

---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we 're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3nua353dd88ankkjo91bpj351gnrjtrm8o4dqhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1i6cor6c1h2bs)

clean_body: I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win! | | | Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win! While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... ...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of How We Win to be so URGENT and so IMPORTANT that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible. How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we 're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, . 625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Shift WA
subject: [FWD] PETITION: Do not seat serial liar
body:
Did you get a chance to read our previous email?

During his campaign, newly elected State Representative Clyde Shavers (10th LD) claimed to have served as a submarine officer despite failing to complete the officer training course and even exhibited a "disdain of enlisted service members" and a "revulsion to wear the uniform."

Mainstream media outlets refused to publicize the story even as voting was well underway. Thousands of voters never knew about Shavers' lies before they cast their ballots.

Shavers' disgusting and dishonorable lies about his military service disqualifies him for any elected position. Allowing Shavers to serve in the State House is an insult to voters across Washington State. It's a slap in the face to veterans who risked their lives to protect our country.

[**Will you sign our petition demanding Democrats do the right thing, and do not seat Shavers in the State House?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61352367:sFg4RlD1N:m:1:2610672541:BB815D429566D3E7A709168860A73316:r)

**> >> **[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61352367:sFg4RlD1N:m:1:2610672541:BB815D429566D3E7A709168860A73316:r)** <<<**
Thank you,

The Shift WA Team
We here at Shift WA believe that allowing admitted liar Mr. Shavers to serve in the State House is an insult to voters across Washington State. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61352368:sFg4RlD1N:m:1:2610672541:BB815D429566D3E7A709168860A73316:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Democrats have a serious problem on their hands in the form of newly elected State Representative Clyde Shavers (10th LD). Informed voters - notably our readers - may remember that Shavers was exposed as a serial liar days before his election - by his own father. Perhaps the most serious of Shavers' lies proved to be making up his military experience.

**Specifically, Shavers claimed to have served as a submarine officer despite failing to complete the officer training course, and even exhibited a "disdain of enlisted service members" and a "revulsion to wear the uniform." **

Shift WA was the first media outlet to report on the story. Mainstream media outlets like the Seattle Times sat on the story of days even while voting was underway. Despite our best efforts to publicize the story, thousands of voters never knew about Shavers' lies before casting their ballots.

**In other words, the mainstream media helped cover up Democrat Shavers ' lies to see him elected to the State Legislature. **

The seriousness of Shavers' lies cannot be overstated, though the Times merely called them "exaggerations." His disgusting and dishonorable lies about his military service disqualifies him for any elected position. Due to the media's shameful lack of action, it was too late to hold him accountable before his election. **But it 's not too late for Democrats to mend public trust and not seat Shavers.**

We here at Shift WA believe that allowing admitted liar Mr. Shavers to serve in the State House is an insult to voters across Washington State. It's a slap in the face to veterans who risked their lives to protect our country.

_**[Will you sign our petition demanding Democrats do the right thing, and do not seat Shavers in the State House?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61352369:sFg4RlD1N:m:1:2610672541:BB815D429566D3E7A709168860A73316:r)
**_
**> >> [SIGN THE PETITION](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61352369:sFg4RlD1N:m:1:2610672541:BB815D429566D3E7A709168860A73316:r) <<<**
Please consider making your voice heard. Demand action against a serial liar. Hold Shavers accountable.

Thank you,

The Shift WA Team

P.S. We need all the signatures we can get before start of the 2023 legislative session next week. **Will you consider forwarding this email to your family and friends?** | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61352370:sFg4RlD1N:m:1:2610672541:BB815D429566D3E7A709168860A73316:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14106666&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osFg4RlD1N).
---

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Two years since our darkest day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Team, two years ago was one of the darkest days in American history.

Confederate flags and Nazi garb were paraded through the United States Capitol as the building was breached for the first time since 1814. A right-wing mob stormed the steps, scaled the walls, and infiltrated Congress while we were upholding our constitutional duty to certify the election results.

And thanks to the January 6th House Committee, we now know without question that it was a coordinated, organized effort by Trump and his cronies to create distrust in our elections and incite violence that day.

Donald Trump and every member of Congress who enabled his refusal to concede and incitement of violence have blood on their hands, and they must pay for what they’ve done. For the safety of our democracy, it’s time to hold Trump accountable and for criminal charges to be brought against him.

Together, we will recover. And with you by my side, I will continue to fight like hell for our democracy and for our country.

Onward,

Eric Swalwell

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get the truth about these 40 political myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518f63d679dd4dbb8ea479cbd617e24f&_e=dgU_YLeDGQ2nD2jU-PRrM-DKVvb8ggWc4ervlYKFQED_EQK7RV5rqV-HK5YwJwVf62fxjgjwLaIRy2g8b33tM3KwV1NY59_9KNzjdaocmMVwCc7GUyxCsvd5_cn0wXidyv6H2kkqy0fMBCsZAZVKdq2MjM5-X0MqE2TqTICTHFzCnSJv-mUGEHSAtWrGI8-62n1EhGCH4Ct20yqb8W51NZNVCNiAaOuz4F0RrB4BrtLBBqWlR5wLDzVwygQA2p0su_8vTaCEKit2T507BwoiOTWyDWgZddiCXQRZueKP6im7Pjjn-BVqdJ8sb6l2NZTNx467pwCrak4hGro61mbPrne7h5aTBrbp5wzr4MfCjVs%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: [_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518f63d679dd4dbb8ea479cbd617e24f&_e=dgU_YLeDGQ2nD2jU-PRrM-DKVvb8ggWc4ervlYKFQED_EQK7RV5rqV-HK5YwJwVf62fxjgjwLaIRy2g8b33tM3KwV1NY59_9KNzjdaocmMVwCc7GUyxCsvd5_cn0wXidyv6H2kkqy0fMBCsZAZVKdq2MjM5-X0MqE2TqTICTHFzCnSJv-mUGEHSAtWrGI8-62n1EhGCH4Ct20yqb8W51NYY3iM9hN0P3_OpOHDVAwTGLY4iBPu_pp_sQuhA2Wlnl0418Hfa3o85bn7mUnPOiOvddjmUM5VehML449BT3SeXrT7ZenIJf-fQ3Fw6EIj0FJpnGzJ38XNYexyOwiW6BimJ6tUPorIqdfwraTDRS9rQ%3D)
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518f63d679dd4dbb8ea479cbd617e24f&_e=dgU_YLeDGQ2nD2jU-PRrM-DKVvb8ggWc4ervlYKFQED_EQK7RV5rqV-HK5YwJwVf62fxjgjwLaIRy2g8b33tM3KwV1NY59_9KNzjdaocmMVwCc7GUyxCsvd5_cn0wXidyv6H2kkqy0fMBCsZAZVKdq2MjM5-X0MqE2TqTICTHFzCnSJv-mUGEHSAtWrGI8-62n1EhGCH4Ct20yqb8W51NWZSf5EqjzvVuM4a6axsZ_i-ZNELKBsH8c3Ax4SdTWDTLU54_2TJSfS5F5yWGxbESl1TwbFSu2wC3PPvIUzL1U5vq1VR0VLPb8-yAkGK-n8ttHjaFG0KWaIaDSK1uUAn4GGDH-Ti9A4t9VcRYaJNVFI%3D)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518f63d679dd4dbb8ea479cbd617e24f&_e=dgU_YLeDGQ2nD2jU-PRrM-DKVvb8ggWc4ervlYKFQED_EQK7RV5rqV-HK5YwJwVf62fxjgjwLaIRy2g8b33tM3KwV1NY59_9KNzjdaocmMVwCc7GUyxCsvd5_cn0wXidyv6H2kkqy0fMBCsZAZVKdq2MjM5-X0MqE2TqTICTHFzCnSJv-mUGEHSAtWrGI8-62n1EhGCH4Ct20yqb8W51NS5d_7M0hUHxXXxbQdnhdLrg_ynoZMCvdCpJkeFDB2gVBhFz0LKKY7dg9GPPChlGfYgfyVHIwDqB4LG6GBVidQx4i84IW5FlueMThn8oZ5XVtuZN2nH9aJmmXsakrjMvCLbZleEXKDRP-SddPmOaCQE%3D)

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518f63d679dd4dbb8ea479cbd617e24f&_e=dgU_YLeDGQ2nD2jU-PRrM-DKVvb8ggWc4ervlYKFQED_EQK7RV5rqV-HK5YwJwVf62fxjgjwLaIRy2g8b33tM3KwV1NY59_9KNzjdaocmMVwCc7GUyxCsvd5_cn0wXidyv6H2kkqy0fMBCsZAZVKdq2MjM5-X0MqE2TqTICTHFzCnSJv-mUGEHSAtWrGI8-62n1EhGCH4Ct20yqb8W51NYs9QnOQzaqXgoIC9aH9BwR_YRV5z9L9935chXwaZGLlK-h1VqMkHfNuz1X7--rHndB4kASCk1Gq2kX1RIbRcVVr9tG1eY11K6Bo3lrsw-JXkx2xL_q5VkE5nbiSw9snwQyJS-Gtu0AgaBLk07b299w%3D)_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

We're talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who 's so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred 'Republican' of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street - the man who believes in NOTHING - receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won't fix it unless we demand change.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d3de2ef8003422980275b1278d6007e&_e=ioT_yxSYwCuWmE73QTebBO3k0ZGGu_zIfafQnP2Jy_EJNcOhSrfz3XyhRuZQcp7HtKY-MkXFNfa9FIkXdgfqZLkLuiovVoXprFqiOKpD9C0c_9iCJPTkcZOr6HD6Uq2KQ68IGqWsEjVmUvWI8OXTAWR2-vcir0WoKGTainZ9wWjr95t4V2RcQQvQtjUiah8pKTOJPeOb48nhDGzvATAYY_Wk_XevbR2oGIDcuSnnu0bgO1YovaAWlrLZgw8Q73a-5jAWDurMQ2kofewuA5kc9UYPDAtzs1gN5CaVIG4HUZ0%3D) And that's why I'm standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp's attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you 'll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin' McCarthy Speakership. If you're a "NO" Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---

The Establishment "Only Kevin" crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Can't wait to get started
body:
Peter, If the past three days have taught us anything, division accomplishes nothing. We aren't the party of divisiveness or confusion, but the party of common sense.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nhhkljd-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, If the past three days have taught us anything, division accomplishes nothing.We aren't the party of divisiveness or confusion, but the party of common sense. **While waiting to be sworn in,_I'm working for you_.** I'll represent you with honesty, integrity, and enthusiasm to work across the aisle to accomplish what I set forth to do.**I don't only represent a political party, but I represent this _great district_. I have much work to do, and _I can't wait to get started_.**As your Congressman-Elect,

| | **Peter, the SAFE-T Act shouldn’t even be up for discussion, let alone implemented.** It pulls funding from law enforcement officers while allowing violent offenders to roam our streets – _and it’s all because of Democrats’_ _[**soft-on-crime policies.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b8b051d70f474a19bd3ba3003a32f86d&_e=GA3rP53DvX78ZfaqVeFVhLCDop2_VpofaSye1hs_eZI262ij9YfbNPZGyARGuP-oPCT2_OxZxHo4GMClPTs42A6UsyJ6iy4LDSbin77dItj-S0xnaaOftWQAOYvj2GRh3qTyuHawoSNNKXyBwVcM7ytR3hIIpqq9esqZdLu0ymzb6nTtlDda4OWvto5YgjmU1gbENZvTGFwEbbhvz_Zi10hm7lSHRfb5Ax9zGMhakYb-WZHHWcz1ACkWlHN6bCdOR0GvEbNfhAQWpGVyhnsWOHDEbBiAroFLzaqDTcquwy94GBDYU9_WKOiS9ACYPUHLL_COnBMo_8orbnJhR-bRF3Qq-pDVaC_RHn8RnvKlfP3M2jRUqd3M_PT55SSuv7jxH3Z2V5y9iX2wUdu-RI5QyQ%3D%3D)_ **They would rather put law-abiding citizens**** _at risk_****in order to appease criminals.** The worst part? Democrats want to _[**introduce laws**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b8b051d70f474a19bd3ba3003a32f86d&_e=GA3rP53DvX78ZfaqVeFVhLCDop2_VpofaSye1hs_eZI262ij9YfbNPZGyARGuP-oPCT2_OxZxHo4GMClPTs42A6UsyJ6iy4LDSbin77dItj-S0xnaaOftWQAOYvj2GRh3qTyuHawoSNNKXyBwVcM7ytR3hIIpqq9esqZdLu0ymzb6nTtlDda4OWvto5YgjmU1gbENZvTGFwEbbhvz_Zi10hm7lSHRfb5Ax9zGMhakYb-WZHHWcz1ACkWlHN6bCdOpimF66T7C9fSLvXZiuKqi_ZKE_YeHHyAK-6whJ3bareZjV3qGU_arVo5-jaMxiEjtySFsNBGB6cHIu3gWJUaSq2mgqKH4p-Wu2rcSnUQdzVtrVIidOPsfeF5-7nN92JOfp1FkkUB_KA-sLhzh87yvw%3D%3D)_ like this _all across the country_!

name: Mia Bonta
subject: Join us for Ballots & Brunch this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
body:
Hi Peter,
Happy New Year! This Saturday, January 7th, you can vote in-person for the California Democratic Party ADEMs Election – electing the future Assembly District Delegates.
I am supporting the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, a group of 14 candidates who I know will represent our AD-18 progressive values within the Democratic Party. To Get Out The Vote, the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate would like to invite you to their Ballots & Brunch Meet & Greet, only a few blocks away from the in-person voting location . Join them before or after voting to meet the candidates, get a bite to eat, and encourage others to vote!
Save your spot and RSVP for The Unity Slate Ballots & Brunch [http://rsvp.ad18unity.com]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/Ballots-Brunch3.jpg]
It’s extremely important that AD-18 Democrats show up and vote this Saturday! If you didn’t register to vote by mail, this will be one of your only opportunities to make your voice heard. With your help, we can elect the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, candidates who will steer the Democratic Party to create policy that centers working class people and fights for issues such as housing affordability, healthcare, and criminal justice reform.
Here’s the run-down on in-person voting:
When: January 7th, 10am-2pm
Where: 1831 Park Blvd, Oakland, CA 94602
Register online to receive a PIN to be able to fill out your ballot. [https://ademelections.com/register/person]
When voting, please vote for all 14 Progressive & Labor Unity Slate members in the order they appear on your ballot: Zac Bowling #1, Mayra Alvarado #5, Carlotta Brown #6, Victor Flores #7, Doug Bloch #8, Courtney Welch #9, Fay Eastman #10, Jada Taylor Folse #13, Renia Webb #14, Ivan Garcia #19, Rowena Brown #21, Alex Randolph #22, Seth Steward #23, and Kevin Jenkins #28.
Peter, bring your friends/family to vote and stop by Ballots & Brunch this Saturday [http://rsvp.ad18unity.com]
If you need another reason to support the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, check out their full endorsement list. They are supported by various community leaders, elected officials, and organizations – each dedicated to advancing equity in AD-18 in their own right.
The Progressive & Labor Unity Slate is endorsed by:
Assemblymember Mia Bonta
State Controller, Malia Cohen
Oakland Mayor Sheng Thao
Oakland Council President Nikki Fortunato Bas
Oakland Councilmember Dan Kalb
Alameda Mayor Marilyn Ashcraft
Emeryville Mayor John Bauters
Emeryville Councilmember Ally Medina
Emeryville Councilmember David Mourra
Igor Tregub, CPD Environmental Caucus Chair
SEIU-UHW (healthcare workers)
Alameda County Building and Construction Trades Council
Black Women Organized for Political Action
