clean_body: Hi Peter, Happy New Year! This Saturday, January 7th, you can vote in-person for the California Democratic Party ADEMs Election – electing the future Assembly District Delegates. I am supporting the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, a group of 14 candidates who I know will represent our AD-18 progressive values within the Democratic Party. To Get Out The Vote, the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate would like to invite you to their Ballots & Brunch Meet & Greet, only a few blocks away from the in-person voting location . Join them before or after voting to meet the candidates, get a bite to eat, and encourage others to vote! Save your spot and RSVP for The Unity Slate Ballots & Brunch [] [] It’s extremely important that AD-18 Democrats show up and vote this Saturday! If you didn’t register to vote by mail, this will be one of your only opportunities to make your voice heard. With your help, we can elect the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, candidates who will steer the Democratic Party to create policy that centers working class people and fights for issues such as housing affordability, healthcare, and criminal justice reform. Here’s the run-down on in-person voting: When: January 7th, 10am-2pm Where: 1831 Park Blvd, Oakland, CA 94602 Register online to receive a PIN to be able to fill out your ballot. [] When voting, please vote for all 14 Progressive & Labor Unity Slate members in the order they appear on your ballot: Zac Bowling #1, Mayra Alvarado #5, Carlotta Brown #6, Victor Flores #7, Doug Bloch #8, Courtney Welch #9, Fay Eastman #10, Jada Taylor Folse #13, Renia Webb #14, Ivan Garcia #19, Rowena Brown #21, Alex Randolph #22, Seth Steward #23, and Kevin Jenkins #28. Peter, bring your friends/family to vote and stop by Ballots & Brunch this Saturday [] If you need another reason to support the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, check out their full endorsement list. They are supported by various community leaders, elected officials, and organizations – each dedicated to advancing equity in AD-18 in their own right. The Progressive & Labor Unity Slate is endorsed by: Assemblymember Mia Bonta State Controller, Malia Cohen Oakland Mayor Sheng Thao Oakland Council President Nikki Fortunato Bas Oakland Councilmember Dan Kalb Alameda Mayor Marilyn Ashcraft Emeryville Mayor John Bauters Emeryville Councilmember Ally Medina Emeryville Councilmember David Mourra Igor Tregub, CPD Environmental Caucus Chair SEIU-UHW (healthcare workers) Alameda County Building and Construction Trades Council Black Women Organized for Political Action I hope to see you this Saturday – your vote will help determine the future of the Democratic Party. name: Roy Cooper
subject: My commitment to democracy is ironclad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This email is a little longer than usual, but it’s important.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56984321/386519797/823540626?refcode=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njk2NDk4Yy1lMzhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVP-sfQQMGR-ETekIid180invG0z5CRrmWfI4mmO4W0=&emci=4d7bccbe-408d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — Two years ago today, Americans watched stunned and horrified as right-wing insurrectionists overran the United States Capitol. At Donald Trump’s behest, they tried to overturn the results of our presidential election — to steal that choice from the people of this country — and keep Trump in power. Brave law enforcement officers evacuated lawmakers and retook the Capitol. Congress certified President Biden’s election the same night. The insurrectionists failed. **However, the threat to our democracy is not gone.** Those of us who believe in the promise of a government by and for the people must commit ourselves to protect it. I’ll explain more below, but right now, you need to know that North Carolina Republicans are leading a Supreme Court case that might undermine our democracy further. **[We’re petitioning SCOTUS to side with democracy in their decision — and we need your support. Click here to sign on>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56984322/386519798/-58660883?refcode=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njk2NDk4Yy1lMzhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVP-sfQQMGR-ETekIid180invG0z5CRrmWfI4mmO4W0=&emci=4d7bccbe-408d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** _Peter, my commitment to our democracy is ironclad._ Here in North Carolina, I’ve worked hard to strengthen voting rights so that more of us can participate and to prevent radical actors from doing damage to our systems of government. **Right now, NC’s Republican State House leader is actually heading up a lawsuit before the Supreme Court that could fundamentally disrupt democracy as we know it.** Not only could the _Moore v. Harper_ case reinstate an extreme right-wing gerrymander of our legislative districts, but it could also grant state legislatures (like our Republican-controlled legislature) the unchecked authority to decide how federal elections are conducted in their states. _In effect, the legislature could take the ultimate decision _away_ from the voters._ **[This is beyond the pale, and it must be stopped. I’m once again asking you to sign my petition right away demanding the Supreme Court do its duty and protect our democracy>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56984323/386519799/-58660883?refcode=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njk2NDk4Yy1lMzhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVP-sfQQMGR-ETekIid180invG0z5CRrmWfI4mmO4W0=&emci=4d7bccbe-408d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | ****[SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56984324/386519800/-58660883?refcode=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njk2NDk4Yy1lMzhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVP-sfQQMGR-ETekIid180invG0z5CRrmWfI4mmO4W0=&emci=4d7bccbe-408d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=5696498c-e38d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)****

Roy

name: PA Democrats
subject: The GOP didn’t learn from the Insurrection
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
On this day, two years ago, violent right-wing extremists stormed our nation’s Capitol in a brutal attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election. The rioters were intent on stopping the peaceful transfer of power, and overturning the votes of millions of Pennsylvanians simply because they refused to accept the results of the 2020 election.
Thanks to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, the law enforcement officers who restored order in the Capitol, and the members of Congress who did the right thing, our votes were upheld and certified, but we won’t forget the dark stain that insurrectionists cast on the history of our great nation.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email123022&recurring=1�express_lane=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=email123022&recurring=1�express_lane=true]
Now, two years later, it’s clear that Republicans are still allowing the most extreme fringe of their party to again threaten the foundations of our democracy. Just this week, the election of the U.S. Speaker of the House has dragged on for days, with a small faction of right wing radicals holding the rest of Congress hostage.
Don’t let them fool you – January 6th, 2021 and the events of this week are closely related. Each event highlights the GOP’s glaring disrespect for our country's sacred institutions and the lawful transfer of power. This week’s debacle is, in a way, a different kind of GOP insurrection.
This dysfunction is not what Americans voted for.
We need people with clear heads and strong values leading the United States and Pennsylvania – not weak leaders who give in to the most dangerous right-wing extremists they can find. Will you chip in a few bucks to help Pennsylvania Democrats fight the extreme agenda the GOP wants to impose on Pennsylvanians? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/10623email?refcode=email10623]

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Two years after the January 6 insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
House Democrats remain united in the fight for accountability.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56985668/386524881/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_230106Jan6_N_SB_30DO_5_NG_N_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FlNTJhNS1lNjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thDI31zKSxP_MqsJD274U_zfz-IJ64OMGML0lII_S5I=) Peter – it’s been two years since the direct assault on our democracy by emboldened extremists on January 6, 2021. I wanted to take a moment to reflect on that day and our work since to protect democracy. The attack on our Capitol was a violent, coordinated effort to overturn an election on behalf of Donald Trump.

I will never forget watching the news that day. And on this anniversary, I have a renewed commitment to fight for our democracy and protect free and fair elections.

Over the past two years, we have made significant progress:
– After extensive investigations, the FBI has identified and charged more than 978 insurrectionists for their crimes against our nation.
– The January 6 Committee found that former President Donald Trump broke five federal laws trying to overturn the 2020 election that he lost.
– The Committee has recommended four major charges against Trump, including conspiracy to defraud the US, conspiracy to make false statements, obstruction of an official proceeding, and inciting an insurrection.

Even though the GOP now has control of the House, our work holding those responsible for the January 6 insurrection must go on. Now, the Department of Justice has the January 6 Committee’s findings in hand and is working alongside President Biden to ensure justice prevails.

The first days of a Republican-controlled House have already been chaotic, showing the GOP’s lack of leadership. House Democrats remain united and ready to continue our work no matter how the GOP holds us back.

In this together,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andy=20Biggs?=
subject: We need real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
We won’t get it with RINOs | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ffbc8a312f&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Fellow American,
We **BLOCKED Kevin McCarthy** from becoming Speaker of the House...
...but now, we conservatives must lead the fight to _get the leadership we deserve_.
Saving this country from Joe Biden and the Left is going to be tough. That’s why we need a leader who has the record, skill, and ferocity to lead the House GOP.
But I am running out of time to win over my colleagues. **[Can I count on your support as I fight for a conservative Speaker...and finally put the Establishment on notice?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c2f3b4c9e6&e=fdefed58de)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ME](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=749272287f&e=fdefed58de)
---
I’m up against the full weight of the Washington Elite... who are doing everything they can to keep the status quo. The only way we can win is with your support.

They know I’m the most outspoken conservative (and toughest fighter) on Capitol Hill. They know I’ve been fighting for the America First movement from Day 1.

**I won’t allow RINOs and Democrats to sell our country off to the highest bidder for their own self gain and I won’t let Joe Biden and his handler’s radical left-wing agenda to continue any longer.**

America is worth fighting for and I won’t rest until we know leadership of the House reflects the principles and values of millions of Patriots like you.

**[But I cannot get this done without your support. So please, if you can, help me continue this fight right away.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6459795599&e=fdefed58de)**

You’re a leader in our shared fight to save America and I hope that you know your help never goes unnoticed or unappreciated. Thank you for all that you do.

In Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7acee35a62&e=fdefed58de)

name: Gwen S. Moore
subject: Upholding your vote and your voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Peter,

Two years ago today, America witnessed one of the darkest days in our history as MAGA extremists attempted to overturn the result of a free and fair election and reinstate a dictator.

But, because of the brave men and women of the Capitol and DC Metro Police and additional law enforcement, in the dark, early morning hours of January 7th, Lady Freedom watched over us as we proudly carried out the business of Congress and certified the 2020 Election.

The assault on our democracy didn’t end on January 6th. We watched ultra-right Trump supporters wage war on our sacred right to vote during the 2022 mid-terms. And we’re watching it play out again on the floor of the House of Representatives as Republicans hold Congress hostage by their utter inability to unite around a candidate for Speaker. Democrats, on the other hand, remain united behind Leader Jeffries. And we will no matter how many times that Kevin McCarthy selfishly holds out his personal, life-long fairy tale dream of becoming Speaker.

Your voice matters. Your vote matters. I will always stand on the side of liberty, of democracy, and abide by the Constitution of the United States of America.

Contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenjan23test?refcode=0106

Together, #WeRepresent!

Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District
Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
100% Democracy Defender

About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3jr8lhmm9sin176i5514dgupa763oqpn3rd581o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h66oj3cdh2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**

The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztmlg9g79v8pqphmu1d8l2av3va52vg2ur6t4o50_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h66oj3cdh2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.

A TOTAL MESS.

| [ ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf0qebmenhf5gukgqera1fht4pqhmasc16bm11i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h66oj2cph2bs)

Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she’d ever get caught.

She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win.

Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots.

| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn't someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d04f0b78f64969ae1ddccd209bf996&_e=Yf0nTyBxj7TX8d-3oL3CEcL7hLMtgGxiCtoAXvx9fFhfUVWHnwh_5RnX_QyHU1HJBddgSAB7s1_xu0KpByZQgPuslJEW4t4QXDn-CfS41LPt1U0rdBiuOEBZYEKd8WsEGwiV__5x2pZKrVWDSwHTLimI6MC-WLP7vMQovdOyGMvfEtUqR3G07ks8b6rBLSeK5tsXUzqTUTetjURSEPqhrU-2JjsJ4uMcdgt0lUQjqiqgUYkjg1rnDK6RppF2b4f2rmaQl_RDNaWiI5gFLUORR_EDvcm2EkCFG0tluMdvECA%3D "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>")
---
| That's right - as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that's exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We're talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who 's so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred 'Republican' of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street - the man who believes in NOTHING - receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won't fix it unless we demand change.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d04f0b78f64969ae1ddccd209bf996&_e=Yf0nTyBxj7TX8d-3oL3CEcL7hLMtgGxiCtoAXvx9fFhfUVWHnwh_5RnX_QyHU1HJBddgSAB7s1_xu0KpByZQgPuslJEW4t4QXDn-CfS41LPt1U0rdBiuOEBZYEKd8WsE-ceKGvcl0r1BSvWxqbgJ2993SWGJF5Iys_MecxLlWFhH1-2SujmpQezmp5lxhRtFjjHisP2rv73wKu45Tb1AbpPHrQwvfumTWnW0w-m97MXFTQZWpL6ym4hq3Ufp7_MTQikFfQIq1Smo0JBT-iMPTLFgBAMW-Kv7-HxU35kn-IU%3D) And that's why I'm standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp's attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you 'll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin' McCarthy Speakership. If you're a "NO" Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d04f0b78f64969ae1ddccd209bf996&_e=Yf0nTyBxj7TX8d-3oL3CEcL7hLMtgGxiCtoAXvx9fFhfUVWHnwh_5RnX_QyHU1HJBddgSAB7s1_xu0KpByZQgPuslJEW4t4QXDn-CfS41LPt1U0rdBiuOEBZYEKd8WsEHWJVIkThBMo6U117BvpGCXua95nOrFU_76SFqZuMuh6aBpLaYMBOrGJJWLtX-1ZYfanQe8r70AZHG_vzoL4QBJ-vEvrNnGsY5Xr6mYHywKRuS29scig1Q-4hzgRonWTR4gio2AUumazYAgK1WCW72iDwPbZxzEKeHP9gD8oZpa0%3D "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here's why it's so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment "Only Kevin" crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they're coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? ->](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d04f0b78f64969ae1ddccd209bf996&_e=Yf0nTyBxj7TX8d-3oL3CEcL7hLMtgGxiCtoAXvx9fFhfUVWHnwh_5RnX_QyHU1HJBddgSAB7s1_xu0KpByZQgPuslJEW4t4QXDn-CfS41LPt1U0rdBiuOEBZYEKd8WsEw1ArAuEeYVGYsgvQvDzWRXLv8VasKDJNLdv0a8KX4QeRUPPn_YbCcw8amEmugcLjpmFRSNkdKswhSAEvu_cBzV0SjqdYNjLjGkRQfmQLkYPDYhJ0PoK3Gw2-IoKVcAVylmS_Z9qnwWDJj0YuBhp6jq6hz8Dwjxc_HbWp3c7sO74%3D) This is a fight worth having, friend. I'd be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d04f0b78f64969ae1ddccd209bf996&_e=Yf0nTyBxj7TX8d-3oL3CEcL7hLMtgGxiCtoAXvx9fFhfUVWHnwh_5RnX_QyHU1HJBddgSAB7s1_xu0KpByZQgPuslJEW4t4QXDn-CfS41LPt1U0rdBiuOEBZYEKd8WsE-FQTnp53NzAM09dnTAUPzmcufzutPzjUiL3Wj4EvVvYUhfchDM3YEDMRd1_LQglR0fESB955GWWHzadFqClCdI9RLfc4_Qu2Vf0hr0vr4zicz4tf8ieCyacmblJ6CmapMPiTMh7sQEpPYe-A4kt4rR6TVLkHKPskMB2psbboiaM%3D "DEMAND. body:
I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER! [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7535%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=NYcihBAKx0yXujUsuHp53w&sysid=1)

---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78513%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zvdrLz%2fBSX2TuMAVvthihw&sysid=1 "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY ")
---
| That’s right - as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them ..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street - the man who believes in NOTHING - receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78514%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A3j%2bPZAvOenMl47hHIqtuw&sysid=1) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78525%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8UN7NkksF2X705vUD%2bwzbQ&sysid=1 "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78526%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mxIyGohYgX1rcnmc62jB5Q&sysid=1) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78527%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Dpcuq%2fgmBjJEQmeUmD4pew&sysid=1 "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.")

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Two years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

Two years ago today, I watched in horror as an angry mob stormed the U.S. Capitol to stop the certification of the 2020 election. We all know why they were there. And we all know who sent them there. [**They told us in their own words:**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX9TzN5pMRmMW1ZNQKB818ZcVW61z83B4VtndYN3pwdFt3q90JV1-WJV7CgY63W8wMtcH5Q-ZmCW82-J-F5g75ZzW3KM_kr4H2pHkW73k53Q3w7L2FW35P59j4QpKn0VDmXz65Ht_7YW68qfKt2Qn5lBW4Pw3TW3yWH4LW6m-CcT5wrhvtW48CHsB4LTD8bW8HDKcg3DypRfW6-dvwx8BmgSfVdgMq94QVwSjW1hxpMv5lXKdlW2ygWd37VczmZW41zh2f1KMpX_W5thnXr4PvgxGW5SqYNg9d73b0W5x5qDT647qsBW3cH8MD193h27W6vJgq86m_9DgW9bFPwQ4H-YfTW2Zt_mm7bC_pNW3LF9Wh2-j2YKW23NxmF6MjP8xW3WyD4N85S5t1N6DpxFLq6DHjW7TDh7Y7PqSWy3dQM1)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX9TzN5pMRmMW1ZNQKB818ZcVW61z83B4VtndYN3pwdFt3q90JV1-WJV7CgSrLW2BXvf96T0qkdW1Rz8J33rrC4pW3DNr4K1hggPjW56LwVb3spxftW33nHqz7gPlwKW5W8YNj4WD55xN18rqP0TxyJLW4SX_BX3Sj5PZW5mpd_k1N9y2yV9_KNT5BDc_9W5NVzx48hG0L1W1XCghn82M037W40GRKZ7454_PVhXMtX6b3jSDW3kd5Pc8qDmxVW5W-vrv7XkDZcW3jw7qH4mwNS0W3DpSh76tjXRtW2srJKZ5yF99bW3jRYvv2yyh__W4X1shV4-rWDYW17F-y517pJzXW2JP58y2Pkq78W3vp-6X5J_9fdW4qxJTP2pkf0zW7sGmll6zPgWxW7_lFt-4fZZYgW81HZ5W4nrrN83k511)
---
While we saw the power of Trump’s lies on that day, we also saw remarkable examples of courage. Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, Anthony Gonzalez, Peter Meijer, Jaime Herrera Beutler, Tom Rice, Fred Upton, and John Katko all sacrificed their political careers to warn the GOP about where Trump was leading the party.
##
Liz said it best during her time on the House January 6 Committee: “Republicans cannot both be loyal to Donald Trump and loyal to the Constitution.” [**Watch this footage from January 6**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX9TzN5pMRmMW1ZNQKB818ZcVW61z83B4VtndYN3pwdFt3q90JV1-WJV7CgGKTW6Kww9L85BRKcW56CGHs7ffPl8V7HMY82_pk2gW6NvWQN9kqKLbW5-Ztb636Q8PqW5dS80439dzqxW1vHQrC1tMd26W74NmRm61GkMzW6JQg7t164T_CW5wJh3_1GscmwW9llyb58VXyb0VGZdvs5m887LN8tLh3fkSmrWW8Y8Mdf8Bt4k-W8J-qGl7rMxC3W381hJj8PSgVjW66mgXD2618ppW5_-TMm6SPlx5Vdc4Yc2LRShhW8NcHPy1xmJ6rW1jdCHZ7N2pcBW3J9c548y0M89W3W6FtQ7lkHQ7W3plzZj2kn9XNN25J6rMR5fC-W67R8d05cB8y5W402yJV6Z9Y_XW80vrh33krJ893dsh1), and you’ll see why her words remain true.
##
As we get closer to the 2024 cycle, we’re going to be there to remind voters about days like January 6. We can’t let Trump and his loyalists move on from the disaster they created that day.
##
That’s why we’re going to make sure Trump never holds power again.
##
Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: | Friend, Two years ago today, I watched in horror as an angry mob stormed the U.S. Capitol to stop the certification of the 2020 election. We all know why they were there. And we all know who sent them there. While we saw the power of Trump’s lies on that day, we also saw remarkable examples of courage. Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, Anthony Gonzalez, Peter Meijer, Jaime Herrera Beutler, Tom Rice, Fred Upton, and John Katko all sacrificed their political careers to warn the GOP about where Trump was leading the party. Liz said it best during her time on the House January 6 Committee: “Republicans cannot both be loyal to Donald Trump and loyal to the Constitution.” , and you’ll see why her words remain true. As we get closer to the 2024 cycle, we’re going to be there to remind voters about days like January 6. We can’t let Trump and his loyalists move on from the disaster they created that day. That’s why we’re going to make sure Trump never holds power again. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| Peter,
This is Matt, reaching out with an update on the battle for Speaker of the House.
McCarthy and his allies have pulled every trick in the book to silence me and give the Swamp's biggest alligator his coronation as Speaker of the House...

* They called me a "terrorist" and compared my colleagues and me to the "Taliban."

* They threatened to pull our committees from us if we didn't bend the knee.

* They even said they were prepared to fund an "endless war" against us (and that's in ADDITION to the one in Ukraine!)

Peter, this is how the Swamp reacts when you threaten the status quo. But I'm Not Backing Down!
[And I need to know if you're still with me. ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yQVcX0xNZZ_EJbWKUExR0fnJug-4TMjsGXoYUkigGROkz1QQoeWeDUvDlDVZR7KJmEFZNE4PLKP1Vw2dOeAK2RP9gQMS77rJ3nwW1Fy9Js7E7pJ-N1ABDLZrH6cpcqEMENiVCu30GEAJH45w5uN-vxZpB0JwZrndPXtbpUazhqK00m2KwWlIxtfLnltu7k1GA4fATRySWww=&c=AZY9okBwYA_BSwv7ydVry91LirghthvuPiKDCMdP1KsGL-PvnDGnKg==&ch=qALbiJ-i5m65-5prv3NzasqjQT-TqNltWHSHtXnD07T3FcGMFK-6lA==)
Because right now, the D.C. Establishment is ESPECIALLY triggered that I brought up a different name for the Speaker role: DONALD JOHN TRUMP.
So they started using their resources to flood my office with robo-calls trying to pressure us to give up the fight!
If you're not planning on backing down any time soon, [we need to send that message to the Swamp RIGHT NOW to ensure the America First Base is not ignored. ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yQVcX0xNZZ_EJbWKUExR0fnJug-4TMjsGXoYUkigGROkz1QQoeWeDUvDlDVZR7KJmEFZNE4PLKP1Vw2dOeAK2RP9gQMS77rJ3nwW1Fy9Js7E7pJ-N1ABDLZrH6cpcqEMENiVCu30GEAJH45w5uN-vxZpB0JwZrndPXtbpUazhqK00m2KwWlIxtfLnltu7k1GA4fATRySWww=&c=AZY9okBwYA_BSwv7ydVry91LirghthvuPiKDCMdP1KsGL-PvnDGnKg==&ch=qALbiJ-i5m65-5prv3NzasqjQT-TqNltWHSHtXnD07T3FcGMFK-6lA==)
Don't let the preferred choice of Big Tech and the lobbyists pressure his way into being Speaker of the House! Keep up the fight and help me STOP Kevin McCarthy!

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs63pf0su3s4nsr5ua3e1h7irji8rark5rk9okco_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h61p76chh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56mc7ut1giin3t6tdbqlh71rslbj5dqtbkame4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h61p76chh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z496mt7dc79664s0q0cdj10o2fonn69omutu9teg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h61p76chh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. clean_body: We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... clean_body: | = | | Honestly, folks – this is the supposed Republican House Majority that pledged to fight for working people? Give me a break. = | | | = | | = House Republicans need to get a grip and take a step back into reality. Americans want a Congress that can get to work for them and their families, not one that’s stuck in a ridiculous fight for power. I’m standing united with my Democratic colleagues in support of an agenda that puts working people first. When Republicans do eventually decide on which Speaker they’d like to choose, you better bet that we’ve got our work cut out for us. Medicare, Social Security benefits, climate protections, and reproductive freedom will all be on the chopping block. In my recent election, I saw what this team can do when we’re united behind a cause. I know we have what it takes to stand up against the far-right Republican agenda and win. But I can’t do it without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
body:
(+ a school choice surprise) |
---
| | I wanted to get this to you **BEFORE** the weekend...

Because I recently sent the Republican members of the Senate Health & Welfare committee a copy of a bill I have ready.

It's VERY simple, really...

It has to do with the state, _**parental rights, and "vack-seens"**_ (I had to spell it that way to avoid filters that might mark this as SPAM).

It does one thing: prohibits a parent's decision not to have their child vaxxed from being used as grounds to terminate parental rights.

That's it...

Other states have protections like this in place (e.g. Michigan, and Colorado) but we do not. Remember Baby Cyrus, who made big headlines in Idaho last year because the state took him _**_quite literally_**_ from his mother's arms?

Well, the case against Baby Cyrus's parents was just DROPPED.

All charges, gone.

After 9 months of pure hell, media smears, and lawyers' fees... **case dismissed**.

Because at the end of the day, parents get to decide what's best for their kids, _not the state_.

So, given the fear-mongering by the far left, every paid-off celebrity and politician, and mainstream media pushing "vack-seens" let's see if we can put another layer of protection in place for Idaho families.

If you'd like to _ _ reach out to members of the Senate Health and Welfare committee to let them know you want to see this health freedom protection put in place (i.e. to prohibit a parent's decision not to have their child vaxxed from being used as grounds to terminate parental rights)...

[You can contact them here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=7dbf25eb59&e=dea908e0fe "Contact Senate H&W members")

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s.**

I can send you the bill draft if you want (plus some supporting info). Just hit reply and let me know.

**p.p.s**

A handful of us on the Senate Education committee are doing a school choice town hall next week.

I hope you can join us, [details are here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=e965418d07&e=dea908e0fe "Thursday PM School Choice Townhall Details").

\----------

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=500e50a635).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) Want to support the cause? [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=19a4c12954&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight").

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Debunking 40 popular political and economic myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true. It’s a narrative that you’ll often see

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2jngnp39qqe1sa077tkj1hqaqj6f73m2ifkeq3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h69o72cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4dllni6jrtdhit6da2tof1o2p8t5ns43f8p1slg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h69o72cph2bs)**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3fv4jvmtjkun3bkcar951jh9j2ihqbm1kmbpl6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h69o72cph2bs)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztea8mhm20egvbd5cql2r8f79opkvjcvtfl46fgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h69o72cph2bs)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _**[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbsem3m0dko5c4hflkd3j7688cg30sjk2nkfgcd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1h69o72cph2bs)**_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mark Warner
subject: On the anniversary of the January 6 insurrection…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I’m still fighting to restore trust in our electoral system

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56993903/386535735/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTAzZmJkMy1mMDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bym0Wlpm-M-64hOVqRemxjoSg7_Xe-K5XEMcPDu1Nso=&emci=6824d2c8-ea8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=de03fbd3-f08d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Two years ago today, we witnessed a harrowing attack on our democracy. I was on the floor of the Senate on January 6 – I’ll never forget it. As I reflect on that day, I’m proud to say that I’ve done everything in my power to ensure we never allow the events of January 6, 2021 to ever happen again. After working with my Senate colleagues, we passed the bipartisan _Electoral Count Reform Act_ , enacting greater protections against attempts by politicians and insurrectionists to undermine the will of the voters. Our bill helps prevent dangerous attempts from fringe members of Congress or a defeated President to overturn the results of an election – circumventing the potential for uncertainty surrounding vote certification and the transition of power. This is a positive step towards preventing future violent insurrections, but my work doesn’t stop here. There is still more to be done to safeguard our democracy. What’s next? In the new Congress, we need to increase penalties for those who threaten election workers, increase USPS capacity to handle election mail, and advance new protections for voting rights. The passage of our _Electoral Count Reform Act_ is a massive first step – but I won’t stop working to bolster trust in our elections and secure our democracy from those who seek to undermine it. Thank you, Mark **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56993904/386535736/-2006620078?refcode=mw_em_230106_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTAzZmJkMy1mMDhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bym0Wlpm-M-64hOVqRemxjoSg7_Xe-K5XEMcPDu1Nso=)**

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Debunking 40 popular political and economic myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true. It’s a narrative that you’ll often s

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8ce8otpk0icrfliojah09jo571p892odg2f0mf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j60p33clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztu4sm4qqggdhh5eauhnkljr17tf9r2n968esvm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j60p33clh2bs)**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgf72olfcj57s69arnetuhmv7ju94ta0660re4io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j60p33clh2bs)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgjafalufor3jq0c7bkq9th3r1ptdulelps4ijo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j60p33clh2bs)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _**[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc2lt0l9pa0cmcqvdhh2athsql9kro59pd0kvh08_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j60p33clh2bs)**_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
---

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Two years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Friends -
Today marks two years since far-right extremists attacked the US Capitol with the goal of stopping Congress from certifying the results of a fair and free presidential election. There were countless heroes on that day. Like the Capitol and DC Metro Police, and the representatives in the Capitol who remained committed to their constitutional duty to certify the results of the election.
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Today, we remember their bravery and honor their dedication to the values our country was founded on.
Let us use this day as a reminder that our democracy is not a given. It’s fragile. It takes each and every American who believes in the will of the people to do their part to protect it.
We have seen what can happen when representatives put misinformation over democracy. I’m committed to working in Congress on behalf of North Carolinians, and Americans across the country, to protect the right to vote and the integrity of our elections. I will fight for the right for every voice to be heard, and for the results of our elections to be upheld, no matter the outcome. Because that is the pillar on which our country was built, and that’s how our democracy prevails.
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0301%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=b2Bo4rygl9SjI0FKmeGwmA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fs8HPFdFmvMRwiz0gTQOIg&sysid=1)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don’t understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don’t know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That’s why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice’s Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655868%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zaTlqOdGXg0UEKw9nBanPg&sysid=1)

**This is my story.**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fs8HPFdFmvMRwiz0gTQOIg&sysid=1)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world’s worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his “crime” was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That’s why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fs8HPFdFmvMRwiz0gTQOIg&sysid=1)

That’s why I’m asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655869%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fH8kG9IFZ7DNW6gRlh80rQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655860%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eCKshBDOzSxBTcq3kgKBFw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655861%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5drlUTDMHcD%2b4yiAqdF3JA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655862%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=98ZS8CKJALXU9erkMVsN9g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655863%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tdTCQalX6NVz98IEdnSWMw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655864%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tsy5fHJvc3yrAiLgncK0zA&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655876%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Me6AKqIEywm44lWsJI14g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655877%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r4uthMrNGdji5XmUnh74cA&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

name: Michael Bennet
subject: January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
I was there when the rioters tried ending our democracy. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56996338/386536643/-1897344272?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230106_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0ZWRiNC1mMjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqIVaqWF32Jt7LjhFQQoTIV3lryk5tI0dT3Ve4RgDb0=&emci=a5666560-e18d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=27a4edb4-f28d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540) Folks, Two years ago today, I was in the United States Capitol when violent rioters — gathered by Trump, fueled by lies, and egged on by National Republicans — assaulted the heart of our democracy. They attacked law enforcement, threatened our lives, and nearly ended the peaceful transfer of power. They claimed to be patriotic Americans, but the flags they bore were those of Trump and Nazi symbols. Their only allegiance was to Trump and his lies. It was a terrifying day, but here’s what I find even more sickening: **After all of it, National Republicans still,_to this day_ , refuse to stand up to the man who caused it all.** Donald Trump is still their leading presidential candidate. And Senate Republicans, who saw the wreckage with me in the Capitol that day, still provide cover for his lies about stolen elections. Two years later, our democracy’s still under attack. [**If you believe, like me, that our democracy is in danger, please add your name to commit to defending it every day — at home, in your community, and at the ballot box in every election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56996339/386536644/-1897344272?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230106_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0ZWRiNC1mMjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqIVaqWF32Jt7LjhFQQoTIV3lryk5tI0dT3Ve4RgDb0=&emci=a5666560-e18d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=27a4edb4-f28d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540) | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56996340/386536645/-1897344272?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230106_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0ZWRiNC1mMjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqIVaqWF32Jt7LjhFQQoTIV3lryk5tI0dT3Ve4RgDb0=&emci=a5666560-e18d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=27a4edb4-f28d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)**
---
When you add your name alongside mine, you are saying you will speak up, stand up, and take action whenever you see injustice.
You are saying you’ll vote in every election, big or small, for candidates who fight for truth and defend the right to vote.
You are saying you’ll keep fighting for a democracy that represents all Americans and an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the very top.
You are saying you believe our best days still lie ahead.
Fellow citizens, our democratic example has always shined brightest when we stood for both freedom and opportunity; one idea cannot meaningfully exist without the other.
I will never stop fighting to leave our democracy stronger for generations to come. It is the work of our lifetimes.
[**Please add your name if you’re with me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56996341/386536646/-1897344272?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230106_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0ZWRiNC1mMjhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqIVaqWF32Jt7LjhFQQoTIV3lryk5tI0dT3Ve4RgDb0=&emci=a5666560-e18d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=27a4edb4-f28d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)
Yours in the fight,
Michael

body:

| | | [Sign the petition: Stop blocking Capitol tour guides from mentioning Jan 6 attack >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66b394f6-54bb-4959-ab94-6ff84ffc2f67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | In a shocking report, the _Washington Post_ revealed that the **Capitol Visitor Center has banned Capitol tour guides from mentioning the January 6th attack,** unless they are specifically questioned about it. The attack on the Capitol was not only one of the darkest days in our nation's history, it was one of the most newsworthy events ever to happen at the Capitol. Whitewashing it from a tour is both absurd and appalling. And if this is related to the Republican takeover of the House, that makes it even worse. [**Add your name, and tell the Capitol Visitor Center to stop blocking tour guides from mentioning the January 6th attack.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e401c13-7397-4a9d-aa3a-4c93e65625d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

Biden and the Democrats refuse to call it what it is - but we will.

**Peter, this is more than a border crisis. This is a threat to our national security.**

We MUST support our border patrol officers, enforce our immigration laws, and most importantly BUILD THE WALL - and we need your help.

subject: 3 More State Freedom Caucuses!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# State Freedom Caucus Network expanding reach across US, as more states set up groups
---
|
## The network has the direct support of the House Freedom Caucus
---
| By [Adam Shaw](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=8908a9426d&e=64ecec6d03) [| Fox News](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=ee309a9fb5&e=64ecec6d03) **Published** January 4, 2023 1:11pm EST
---
|
---
| Rep. Scott Perry speaks to reporters following a meeting with House Republicans at the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 3, 2023. (Kevin Dietsch/Getty Images)
---
| [The State Freedom Caucus Network](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=19d5ed7360&e=64ecec6d03), which launched at the end of 2021 with the support of the influential House Freedom Caucus, expanded its reach throughout the U.S. on Wednesday after what organizers say was a groundbreaking 2022.
The network, run by veteran Republican strategist Andy Roth and former House Freedom Caucus Executive Director Justin Ouimette, officially launched additional state caucuses in Wyoming, Montana and Idaho on Wednesday – taking the number of states it has caucuses in to 10. The network helps establish caucuses at the state level, while offering financial support and other resources as they seek to keep their parties in line with conservative principles, in the same way that the House caucus has sought to keep leadership’s feet to the fire in Washington, often provoking the ire of powerful [Republican lawmakers](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=c0d4fe87b1&e=64ecec6d03) who see such efforts as extreme. In an interview with Fox News Digital, Ouimette and Roth said that they intend to launch a total of between 10-15 additional states in 2023 so that they will be in half of the states by the end of the year. **"** 2023 is going to be an amazing year for conservatives," Roth said. We're witnessing what's happening at federal level and that fight I think still needs to occur. And thankfully, we had the House Freedom Caucus in Congress to do that. But all of the big fights in our countries are happening at the state level." He mentioned school choice, election integrity and critical race theory as some of the top issues facing conservatives at the state level, although he noted that issues change depending on the individual state. **"** These are big, big fights. And before the network was created, conservatives simply didn't have the organization and the strategy to fight effectively." The network has three prongs: an educational arm to train lawmakers on policy and procedure; the network itself to recruit conservatives at the state level; and an "action" arm to help protect conservatives from retaliation in primaries and to expand numbers. Across the now more than a dozen states, organizers pointed to a number of successes. In Georgia, a mental health bill underwent changes after the freedom caucus and others raised concerns that it would fund transgender surgeries and made it easier for guns to be removed from Georgians due to mental health concerns. Meanwhile, in Mississippi, the state’s caucus helped kill an economic development bill that would have created an inter-state agency that opponents feared would be able to unaccountably levy taxes and seize property through eminent domain. But organizers say that the long-term effect may be broader than specific campaigns against individual pieces of legislation, and may instead be in patterns of voting behavior from lawmakers. **"** A big difference that we expect to see are changes in voting behavior where conservatives may have taken a walk or gotten shouted down before," Ouimette said. "They have a built-in legislative coalition to vote with and the organization and infrastructure to communicate their ideas out and change the voting behavior of their colleagues. And I think we'll see that in the dozen states that were in." The network has the full support of the House Freedom Caucus itself, which is regularly a thorn in the side of Republican leadership in Washington. At time of writing on Wednesday, the caucus had successfully helped GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy from taking the speaker’s gavel. Former Speaker John Boehner had referred to the caucus as "anarchists" who want "total chaos." Current Freedom Caucus Chair Scott Perry said, in a statement to Fox Digital, that the state network in one year "has empowered state-level conservatives to fight against local issues that directly affect their daily lives." "This Nationwide network is critical in providing conservatives the resources to challenge the status quo, hold the establishment accountable, and serve as the conservative conscience in state Houses across the Country," he said. "I look forward to continuing our efforts at the state and federal level to promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for the American People." Now, with 10 networks set up, organizers have one eye towards the 2024 election cycle, particularly the primaries -- where they intend to promote and support more conservative candidates to fill out their numbers at the state level. "We’ll be ready," Ouimette said.

Adam Shaw is a politics reporter for Fox News Digital, primarily covering immigration and border security. He can be reached at [adam.shaw2@fox.com](mailto:adam.shaw2@fox.com) or on [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=3f1e49f974&e=64ecec6d03).

In Georgia, a mental health bill underwent changes after the freedom caucus and others raised concerns that it would fund transgender surgeries and made it easier for guns to be removed from Georgians due to mental health concerns. Meanwhile, in Mississippi, the state’s caucus helped kill an economic development bill that would have created an inter-state agency that opponents feared would be able to unaccountably levy taxes and seize property through eminent domain. But organizers say that the long-term effect may be broader than specific campaigns against individual pieces of legislation, and may instead be in patterns of voting behavior from lawmakers. " A big difference that we expect to see are changes in voting behavior where conservatives may have taken a walk or gotten shouted down before," Ouimette said. "They have a built-in legislative coalition to vote with and the organization and infrastructure to communicate their ideas out and change the voting behavior of their colleagues. And I think we'll see that in the dozen states that were in." The network has the full support of the House Freedom Caucus itself, which is regularly a thorn in the side of Republican leadership in Washington. At time of writing on Wednesday, the caucus had successfully helped GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy from taking the speaker’s gavel. Former Speaker John Boehner had referred to the caucus as "anarchists" who want "total chaos." Current Freedom Caucus Chair Scott Perry said, in a statement to Fox Digital, that the state network in one year "has empowered state-level conservatives to fight against local issues that directly affect their daily lives." "This Nationwide network is critical in providing conservatives the resources to challenge the status quo, hold the establishment accountable, and serve as the conservative conscience in state Houses across the Country," he said. "I look forward to continuing our efforts at the state and federal level to promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for the American People." Now, with 10 networks set up, organizers have one eye towards the 2024 election cycle, particularly the primaries -- where they intend to promote and support more conservative candidates to fill out their numbers at the state level. "We’ll be ready," Ouimette said. Adam Shaw is a politics reporter for Fox News Digital, primarily covering immigration and border security. He can be reached at mailto:adam.shaw2@fox.com or on . | | "CLICK HERE TO DONATE" | | | | | Copyright © 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Two years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Two years ago today, the future of our country changed forever.
#
Peter,
Two years ago today, the future of our country changed forever when armed insurrectionists stormed the Capitol building.
Donald Trump’s claims of a stolen election and violent rhetoric motivated these extremists to stop at nothing to tear down our democracy.
Last year, I wrote to you to ask you to support the House committee’s crucial investigation into January 6. Now, we’re entering a new era of Congress, but our work to defend democracy continues. With a Republican-led House of Representatives, it is more important than ever to remain vigilant in our fight to protect fundamental rights and freedoms.
Protecting our democracy is hard work. We cannot brush the ugly past under the rug. We must continue to confront the truth of what happened that day.
My promise to you is the same as last year—I will do whatever it takes to deliver justice and protect the future of our nation.
My best,
Dick Durbin
