name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Very few people are talking about it, but on January 10th there's a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat. Your support right now would make a huge difference to preserving abortion rights for women in Virginia.
body:
01/10/2023 election
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36e28a71-9d0b-4b4f-ba33-1f6d8e8e5b45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In four days, Virginia could begin the process of making abortion illegal._** _**This isn't hyperbole. Very few people are talking about it, but on January 10th there's a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat, and your support right now would make a huge difference. **_ Why is this so important? Because, in 2019, riding a wave of lies about "CRT," anti-chioce zealot Glenn Youngkin was elected Governor. Also, Republicans took the state house and came within a vote of the state senate. In other words, a slender majority in the state senate is the last bulwark vs Republicans turning women into second class citizens. [**_This one state senate seat will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians. Can you join us right now in making Virginia safe for Virginia women, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Aaron Rouse for state Senator, a man who'll protect women's rights and fight the retrograde Youngkin agenda?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf75bdc0a-c0e1-4684-8967-1e312e81a73e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrats have a 21-19 lead in the state senate, but one Democrat, Joe Morissey, refers to himself as pro-life and supports Republican efforts to ban abortion._ **_Democrats, fortunately, have abortion-rights defender Aaron Rouse running._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taec73615-1453-429e-85ff-684a2ac5488a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Rouse has experience as a Virginia Beach City Councilman for four years and name recognition as a former Virginia Tech and NFL football player. Rouse is running against Kevin Adams. All that matters about him: If elected he'll join 19 other Republicans, a renegade Democrat and Youngkin to make abortion illegal. _** _This will cause women grievous harm and, in some cases, death. Doctors fearing prosecution will refuse to see women having miscarriages and other complications, as was just reported is happening in Louisiana RIGHT NOW._ [**_This one state senate seat will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians. Can you join us right now in making Virginia safe for Virginia women, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Aaron Rouse for state Senator, a man who'll protect women's rights and fight the retrograde Youngkin agenda?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07c13c4e-f791-49da-99b5-613932a0a349/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, my friends.
Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T116feb7c-4d94-42a9-9bab-d88327652205/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

| | |

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/aaronrousevirginiastatesenate5-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54e29f52-18f5-4c92-b9ca-15752ad99d43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: January 6, 2021 - I was ready to fight that day.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
#

Peter -
Two years ago, emboldened by President Trump and his enablers, our democracy was pushed to the limit by the treasonous actions of violent insurrectionists.
A lot of people have asked me what that day was like for me as a combat veteran, so I wanted to take a moment to share some reflections with you.
First, as a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor.
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find.
I never imagined I would ever have to teach my staff how to knock on the door of our office a certain way to signal it was them and not some attacker — something we did in the Marine Corps when surrounded by insurgents and you didn’t know who was good and who was bad.
And I never imagined I’d have to text members of the House and urge them not to get on buses ready to evacuate us from the Capitol because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup.
The truth is, I was ready to fight that day. Physically. To protect our democracy. I remember wanting my weapon, but the only thing I could find around me was a pen and that was going to have to be it. And I remember wishing my Marines were with me.
People ask me if I think that will be the last time anything like that ever happens.
And the truth is, that type of brazen action probably won’t happen the same way. But the attack on our democracy will continue through legal decisions. Through the Supreme Court. Through the lower courts. Through the State Houses that make decisions that subvert our democracy.
Reflecting again on January 6, I am proud of how Democrats reacted and returned to the floor to certify the presidential election.
I am proud that most Democrats did what they could to further protect and strengthen our democracy after January 6.
But that fight will have to continue.
And as someone who joined the United States Marine Corps to defend this country and protect our democracy, you can count on me to be on the front lines of that battle.
Thanks for reading,
Ruben Gallego
* * *
[**Can you please make a contribution to Ruben Gallego today? He is considering running for U.S. Senate in Arizona but can only do it if the grassroots support is there. So please chip in $5, $10 or whatever you can today. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9u5cinn47cudotpljelqm1t1o5dd3nefboeuoao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j61pr0c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb58e5vso7po08n88vn6n09cblanforr9ov3qvag_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j61pr0c9h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj4m2doh6i55qq3o6rk3a13ukcl2ds5nsqa8cu5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j61pr0c9h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Conservative news update - January 6th Edition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” on behalf of their preferred, GOP establishment-backed candidates
body:
Exclusive coverage this week on decisions made by IL GOP leadership during the primary, and the calls by Illinois Review for Chair Don Tracy to go.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/556612272fc0/alert-conservative-news-update-january-6th-edition?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Sources: IL GOP Blames Jim Durkin for Postage Discount Abuse as GOP Faces Potential Postal Audit (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Sources have confirmed that the Illinois Republican Party was caught off guard earlier this week after Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) exposed deliberate and widespread abuse of the IL GOP postage discount during the Primary. Sources also confirmed a new strategy by party insiders to sidestep any responsibility for the humiliating revelation: blame former House GOP leader Jim Durkin, an ally and best friend to IL GOP chairman Don Tracy.

It’s clear that the IL GOP is in total panic mode and pointing fingers at everybody – including Durkin and John Fogarty, general counsel for the IL GOP.

In
July (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , during a meeting with conservative leaders, IL GOP chairman Don Tracy deflected any responsibility after admitting that the Richard Irvin for governor campaign received the IL GOP postage discount in the primary – a perk not afforded to any other campaign for governor.

Tracy went on to say that usage of the postage discount was decided by the “House Caucus and the Senate Caucus” – again, placing the blame on Durkin, who at that time was leader of the House Caucus.

But Fogarty, who works directly with Tracy as the party’s attorney, played a role in this as well. And while Durkin could decide which campaign received the postage discount, ultimately, Tracy and Fogarty would have the final approval since the postage discount belongs to the IL GOP and no one else, including Durkin.

The Mailing Standards of the United States Postal Service (https://pe.usps.com/text/DMM300/703.htm?q=political+mailings&h=Political%2bMailings&t=H&s=R&p=1&c=DMM%7CQSG&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D#ep1113656) is quite clear on use of the non-profit charity postage rate. It’s also quite clear that Tracy and the IL GOP were in direct violation of those standards and they now risk hefty fines and a suspension of the postage discount if audited by the US Postal Service.

https://pe.usps.com/text/DMM300/703.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In the past, the IL GOP used the postage discount for positive mail pieces, but made worse under Tracy’s leadership, the discount was weaponized (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to target conservative grassroots primary candidates.

And while Tracy deflects the blame for overseeing widespread and humiliating losses during the November election, the US Postal Service, should they conduct an audit, will be looking for the one ultimately in charge of the postal discount – and that’s Don Tracy.

Pointing fingers and deflecting blame only goes so far. And Don Tracy and the IL GOP are about to find that out.

IL GOP, Durkin use Citizens to Change Illinois PAC to Support GOP Spokesman During Primary Against Conservative Candidate (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-durkin-use-citizens-to-change-illinois-pac-to-support-gop-spokesman-during-primary-against-conservative-candidate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During the 2022 Illinois Primary, Joe Hackler wore two hats simultaneously: communications director for the Republican Party of Illinois and candidate for Illinois State Representative, Dist. 112.

A setup that represents a clear conflict of interest and gives Hackler a significant competitive advantage against his Republican conservative grassroots opponent Jennifer Korte, who was endorsed by Republican gubernatorial candidate Darren Bailey.

Not only did Hackler have access to sensitive donor information, email lists and voter data, but as an employee and spokesman for the Republican Party of Illinois, he had the automatic support of senior IL GOP leaders and the establishment.

Hackler also had the support of a political organization called Citizens to Change Illinois. Although not officially affiliated with his campaign, the organization sent out mailers attacking Korte with lies, and trying to link her to disgraced former Democratic House Speaker Mike Madigan.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-durkin-use-citizens-to-change-illinois-pac-to-support-gop-spokesman-during-primary-against-conservative-candidate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-durkin-use-citizens-to-change-illinois-pac-to-support-gop-spokesman-during-primary-against-conservative-candidate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Weaponized Postage Discount to Attack Conservative Candidates During Primary (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
In addition to undeniable evidence of the IL GOP colluding with the Richard Irvin for Governor campaign during the primary, Illinois Review has learned some other disturbing information: the IL GOP was weaponizing their postage discount to attack conservative candidates during the primary.

And in some cases, the IL GOP was taking sides in open primaries and mailing vicious mailers attacking conservative Republican grassroots opponents on behalf of their preferred establishment-backed candidates.

Illinois Review recently reported that the IL GOP’s postage discount was applied to a mailer sent out on behalf of IL Republican State Rep. Tim Butler’s campaign, attacking his fellow Republican grassroots primary opponent Kent Gray. But since the publication of that article, many more candidates have come forward with similar stories of the IL GOP abusing the postage discount in favor of their preferred candidates in the primary.

Illinois Review also has reason to believe that Bailey’s endorsement list became a “hit list” for the IL GOP, where they targeted 7 of the 10 candidates that he endorsed during the primary with negative mailers “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” on behalf of their preferred, GOP establishment-backed candidates.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Exclusive: IL GOP Postage Discount on Mailer Attacking Trump Republican Candidate During Primary (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
In exclusive audio recently obtained by Illinois Review, IL GOP chairman Don Tracy, during a meeting with conservative leaders in July, admits that the Richard Irvin for Governor campaign was allowed to use the IL GOP Postage discount for mailers – a perk not afforded to other candidates in the governor’s race.

Tracy acknowledges use of the postage discount in the recording, but says the IL GOP was taking its “direction from the House Caucus and the Senate Caucus.”

Former Republican candidate for governor Gary Rabine, who ran against Irvin in the primary, recently published (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/rabine-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-should-reimburse-gubernatorial-candidates-for-postage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) an article in Illinois Review after learning of this new information in a previous Illinois Review article – demanding that the IL GOP reimburse every gubernatorial candidate for postage – including his campaign.

And just recently, Illinois Review has learned that the IL GOP’s “non-profit” postage discount was applied to a mailer sent out on behalf of IL Republican State Rep. Tim Butler’s campaign, attacking his fellow Republican primary opponent Kent Gray – who was challenging Butler in the IL House Dist. 95 Republican primary race.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IL GOP Violates Party Platform,
Pays for and Endorses Pro-Choice Mailer
During 2022 Midterm Election (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-violates-party-platform-pays-for-and-endorses-pro-choice-mailer-during-2022-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5caf11d92f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_06_02_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5caf11d92f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a mailer that went out to DuPage County residents just a month before the November election, the wife of Greg Hart, Republican candidate for DuPage County Board Chairman, reiterated that her husband,

“will always protect women’s rights and never restrict our right to choose.”

The problem with the mailer? The mailer was “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party.”

That’s right, the Illinois Republican Party not only endorsed Hart’s pro-choice mailer, they even attached their name to it and paid for it.
** Click to read more. name: The Giffords Team
subject: Will you contribute $10 in honor of ten years of Giffords?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today, we’re kicking off our Ten Year Anniversary Fundraising Drive.
#

**December 14, 2012**
That was the day of the tragic Sandy Hook Elementary shooting. A gunman killed twenty children and six teachers. It was a time of mourning for our nation as we remembered the victims whose lives were stolen from them.
But it was also the day that the national conversation about gun violence shifted. People like you were ready to turn their anger into action. As a nation, we knew that we had to step up and do something to work towards a future where mass shootings no longer happen.
**January 8, 2013**
This was the day that Gabby Giffords founded Americans for Responsible Solutions, the organization now known as Giffords.
After the Sandy Hook tragedy, Gabby founded Giffords with a mission to bring together a coalition of people from all over the country—parents, activists, gun owners, and more—who were sick and tired of seeing too many people dying from preventable acts of gun violence.
**January 8, 2023**
That’s two days from now, and marks the ten year anniversary since Giffords was founded. Today, we’re kicking off our Ten Year Anniversary Fundraising Drive in honor of this important milestone for our organization.
[**To commemorate ten years of Giffords, will you contribute $10 today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=1&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://go.giffords.org/go/20738?c0=giffords-em-jan23.gQ2v4M&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=2&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan23.7iD0Mu&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=3&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan23.5RCsE0&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=4&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan23.CbkSJK&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=5&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan23.bUZFep&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=6&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)**

| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan23.4kE3Tp&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=7&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)**

Thank you for helping us start our tenth year of courage off strong.
\- The Giffords Team
**[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=8&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt)**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=3940%2E3935704%2ENgXCOt) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Tim Burchett
subject: This Is Democracy 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6c4423c64dc24c85a7cd4e4cd88b5584&_e=LqhQJrLsBsbkeGVYMch_u3yyqBL1pJkHZZlsRsO91IYzjzKMAYdgXE_ZdDXss8i4PYSUw_KArnu_P3S1Y_LqxxKEyYsWYvFcxesd3W61_HIXOWmvNcLJ472zKQ4qRDUo3GKB4HY6U_dkOzpQ8_tZiV756Rt1IQeSC9JdvTyBYq3nCVEkP0SEgXuNi88szlJCTBB9gfd3CK0d6EFMXZDonDPtrblWEIjkTmrAKPnS1kqOMVMFjFkkQsOMMKspHH55Qv0-J-v8Qis-aok_P4ltaWzi4-RxkZbnHXPNiu_ruLT3RP_FBljphG670a0Vz8OOn3D9nBhBkFyLMwlmCdYUOg%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **This Is Democracy 🇺🇸**
---
| |
---
What our nation has seen over the past few days trying to elect a house speaker has caused a lot of folks to gripe and complain. But as I see it, this is about democracy. Choosing the best candidate for the third most powerful leadership position in the U.S. takes deep consideration and exchange. And that's exactly what Republicans have done on the House floor this week. The decisions we make as a Republican majority matter, and it is a point of pride we can have this level of debate, unlike the last four years under Nancy Pelosi's reign of terror. So while I look forward to reaching a conclusion that results in swearing in a Republican Congress and Speaker of the House, I want to take a moment to recognize just how lucky we are to have a Republican majority, and all the work we’ll be able to get done.
---
| | |
---
| | **Newly Crowned Comedy King 😅**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6c4423c64dc24c85a7cd4e4cd88b5584&_e=LqhQJrLsBsbkeGVYMch_u4_9SnYBa3ybwLyp4ow6Q70sOcdhn1EpxFR9w_HGkYPayNx66ciMn9nWBIvP0-Qw5BCqoZPmlKpuK3dpt61qvb9Z1ia9OnHG_hKd7e1IJe314HbVsUykQdbyYzY3hiW2yVlctgDfBK6LM-ckSPYC9wuScmf19oGcrVQca5sbiwoy2_7Nib5C6Lpjbej6KCUhxHALhDaM52X89g7Zcw4xZbiNSIth5PPLkx8eySCSM9Ns5YAsqNQeu-Yez-xK4Mx8cQ%3D%3D)
---
Image courtesy of Susan Walsh/AP Photo The people have spoken and deemed me the next [comedy king amongst the House GOP.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6c4423c64dc24c85a7cd4e4cd88b5584&_e=LqhQJrLsBsbkeGVYMch_u4_9SnYBa3ybwLyp4ow6Q70sOcdhn1EpxFR9w_HGkYPayNx66ciMn9nWBIvP0-Qw5BCqoZPmlKpuK3dpt61qvb9Z1ia9OnHG_hKd7e1IJe31g3x5_ebgTnZV0eFlWt8LKURQKNn22lWhf7nrbhojXWUhfnTQuLuSGa8eY3oIfo52G6b1oD_S7spCTbHPQpUX8OZ0tc9AQbpWEx0xP_OaD0FE8ZUI4dHVa24ghhabF-zeotz4ZcjekRYcP1dPzSomrw%3D%3D) Like I always say, I don’t take myself seriously. I take the job seriously. I look forward to continuing to fiercely serve the people of East Tennessee and share more smiles and fist bumps along the way.
---

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | This Is Democracy 🇺🇸 | | What our nation has seen over the past few days trying to elect a house speaker has caused a lot of folks to gripe and complain. But as I see it, this is about democracy. Choosing the best candidate for the third most powerful leadership position in the U.S. takes deep consideration and exchange. And that's exactly what Republicans have done on the House floor this week. The decisions we make as a Republican majority matter, and it is a point of pride we can have this level of debate, unlike the last four years under Nancy Pelosi's reign of terror. So while I look forward to reaching a conclusion that results in swearing in a Republican Congress and Speaker of the House, I want to take a moment to recognize just how lucky we are to have a Republican majority, and all the work we’ll be able to get done. | | | | | Newly Crowned Comedy King 😅 | | Image courtesy of Susan Walsh/AP Photo The people have spoken and deemed me the next Like I always say, I don’t take myself seriously. I take the job seriously. I look forward to continuing to fiercely serve the people of East Tennessee and share more smiles and fist bumps along the way. | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Make do with what you’ve got 😂❄️ ()→ Baggage claim hero 🤩💌 () → Sliding into this weekend like 😆🛷 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Patty Murray
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Can I count on you in the fights ahead?
#
Peter,
You have given me the honor of continuing to serve you in the other Washington — and I am determined to make the most of it. I was sworn into office this week for my sixth term and as the first-ever woman President Pro Tempore in the Senate, and I’m as ready as ever to get to work.
We have made tremendous progress together in the last year, but there’s still so much to do to ensure we finally fix our broken child care system for working families across the country, fight for every worker to have the paid leave they need and deserve, restore _Roe v. Wade_ and a woman’s right to choose, and so much more.
I will also keep listening to the folks like you who sent me to the Senate and make sure your priorities are heard — whether that’s decisive action to battle the climate crisis, much-needed protections for our elections and democracy, or lower health care costs for you and your family.
**[These fights won’t be easy — but nothing worth fighting for ever is. I know I can count on this amazing team to keep standing with me, especially as we work to protect our Senate majority and win back the House. Will you chip in $5 to start 2023 strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57001547/386558037/-426192802?refcode=pm_em_230106_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDkzNDQwZi0wODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IPW9SI-ho3ts7MKAiaW6htH7pt35mpTzE9Hqec_as4U=)**
We can’t predict everything 2023 will bring, but there’s one thing I know for sure: whatever we face, we’ll do it together.
Thank you,
Patty Murray

name: Jim Jordan
subject: 2023 Congressional Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
As Nancy Pelosi relinquishes her speaker’s gavel, House Republicans will have the opportunity to show the American people a be

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztvv7u4m4lrravcju7ce0s8dcv9b402vgb7862s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)
|

Fellow Conservative,

As Nancy Pelosi relinquishes her speaker’s gavel, House Republicans will have the opportunity to show the American people a better vision for our great country that includes:

* ...a vibrant and growing private sector economy,
* ...able-bodied people working,
* ...more domestic energy production and lower gas prices,
* ...a smaller and more accountable federal government, and
* ...restored respect around the world from allies and enemies alike!

Yes, we will still have big spenders in the White House and in charge of the U.S. Senate, but I intend to help lead the charge in the House in changing the direction of our country.

I’m sure you remember from civics class that the House of Representatives holds the federal purse strings. Republicans pledge to take measures to stop the wasteful spending that sparked the inflation crisis. **Our top priority must be to reverse the failed liberal agenda of sending government checks to able-bodied people for not working**.

Republicans will pave the way for renewed domestic energy production, even a return to energy independence, marking a sharp turn from the failed Biden/Pelosi policies.

**Perhaps most importantly,** we will bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud and corruption of the Biden Administration. **I am so energized to embark on this bold mission!**

As we prepare to take control, **[I wanted hear what YOU think the priorities for the next Congress should be.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztp71e5idrd6j5a65spto5133rkdel1hts9ibfb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that every good policy we propose will come under relentless attack by Democrats and the mainstream media, so I want to be sure that as we move forward, we are doing right by trusted patriots such as yourself.

Would you mind taking a moment to **[complete the survey linked below](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqokvj5oscndhp6fosijnuhnutheq1nsuhvt46do_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)** and letting me know what you think about our 2023 Congressional Priorities?
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb12nvr8etqlmjoooganrcbussjbfhqrucu2rang_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)

[**TAKE OUR 2023 CONGRESSIONAL SURVEY
RESPOND NOW -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn5ugo75be65nrmm3ppf1erukkh1bsglgqh871f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)

God Bless,
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb9qteqrtjkosrpe6p75iord6snn6abagop82cqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)
Jim Jordan

P.S. Democrats have done immense damage to this country in the past 24 months, and we are going to be working tirelessly to clean up their mess. Our job is clear, and our vision is strong, but we want to make sure we know YOUR priorities by taking our **[2023 Congressional Survey today.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zls6brckkh2b66tbkoml5cikta8gbkolvq2q0blg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [** JOIN JIM ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2u5a7c3foumi7iuhib7fu5u8eiv9hihadk2a380_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1j69pr2cph2bs)

subject: I released a NEW VIDEO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Too much is at stake | Joe Biden went on national television to announce mass amnesty for an additional 30,000 new illegal immigrants each and every month, which will worsen the Border Crisis that HE CAUSED.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62167479:60QPDvGNR:m:1:3331421248:ECAA0CEA87A5B00DB1A8592CF4CF4D97:r)

_**[BREAKING: JOE BIDEN REVEALS HE HAS NO PLAN TO COMBAT THE BORDER CRISIS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62167479:60QPDvGNR:m:1:3331421248:ECAA0CEA87A5B00DB1A8592CF4CF4D97:r)**_
_" I do not like Title 42."
Joe Biden_

Peter,

This is important.

Joe Biden went on national television to announce mass amnesty for an additional 30,000 new illegal immigrants each and every month, which will worsen the Border Crisis that HE CAUSED.

This is an assault on our laws, our borders, our Constitution, and our country. We need a real leader in charge if we're going to protect Americans from crime and drugs, and secure our southern border, which is why I am proud to present to you my plan to TAKE DOWN THE CARTELS.

I released a NEW VIDEO, and I urgently need YOU to watch it:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62167479:60QPDvGNR:m:1:3331421248:ECAA0CEA87A5B00DB1A8592CF4CF4D97:r)

**[WATCH NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62167479:60QPDvGNR:m:1:3331421248:ECAA0CEA87A5B00DB1A8592CF4CF4D97:r)**

**[Please follow this link to watch my NEW VIDEO IMMEDIATELY.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62167479:60QPDvGNR:m:1:3331421248:ECAA0CEA87A5B00DB1A8592CF4CF4D97:r)**

**Biden 's Open Border policies are a deadly betrayal of our nation. The drug cartels are waging war on America, and it's now time for America to wage war on the cartels. In this war, Joe Biden has sided AGAINST the United States and WITH the cartels.**

When I am back in the White House, it will be the policy of the United States to take down the cartels just as we took down ISIS. The drug kingpins and vicious traffickers will never sleep soundly again. We did it once, and we did it better than anybody else.

**There 's never been a better border than we had just two years ago.** It was strong, it was powerful, and it was respected all over the world. And now we're laughed at all over the world. And we're not going to let that happen much longer.

**We will show NO MERCY to the cartels. We have to be tough, we have to be smart, and we have to be fair. But if we don 't do something immediately, our Country is gone.**

Two years ago today, Donald Trump and his allies in Congress attempted to overthrow American democracy.

Team, Two years ago today, Donald Trump and his allies in Congress attempted to overthrow American democracy. It was a horrific day, a stain on our nation’s history, and a reminder that we must never again take for granted the democratic institutions that sustain our republic. **I’ll be honest with you: it is jarring now to be serving in the same building as some of the people who led the fight to overturn the 2020 election, and who are continuing to use Trump’s Big Lie as a pretext for trying to take away Americans’ fundamental right to vote.** Over the last four days, we’ve gotten a small glimpse of the chaos that these legislators will cause if they are given control of the House agenda — and Kevin McCarthy has promised to give them exactly that in exchange for their votes for Speaker. It is clearer than ever, Team, that America needs leaders who are committed to our democracy and serious about solving the problems regular people face — providing the real solutions that I am committed to delivering, and that our Democratic House majority delivered when they were in power. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. name: John Fetterman
subject: The threat of another Jan 6 hasn't gone anywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
We can't forget, Derek,
Two years ago today, the incredibly dangerous period after the 2020 election culminated in an attack on the Capitol at Donald Trump's urging and people tragically lost their lives.
Everything we've learned about the attack from congressional investigations, and everything we've seen happen since, has made it plain that the threat to our democracy hasn't gone anywhere. That's why we've got to stay vigilant.
**[I'm in the Senate to fight for democracy + hold insurrectionists accountable. If you're with me, can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230106-1?refcode=em20230106-1-8200&refcode2=8200_434096_4VktA4&akid=8200%2E434096%2E4VktA4)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230106-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230106-8200&refcode2=8200_434096_4VktA4&akid=8200%2E434096%2E4VktA4)**
On January 5, 2021 — the day before the attack on the Capitol — the PA GOP ejected me from the Senate chamber so they could unlawfully stop a state senator from being sworn in.
The very next day, dozens of GOP members of the U.S. House and Senate tried to stop the certification of the 2020 presidential election.
Now, on 1/6/23, I'm on my first few days officially representing PA in the Senate. I couldn't take the attacks on our democracy more seriously. **No matter your political beliefs, everybody I know was horrified about the events of two years ago — as Americans.** We *have* to come together to prevent chaos like that from happening again.
The threat isn't gone. I've proven I'll stand up to insurrectionists + I'll do it again. 💯
**[Derek, I promise you this: I'll take on anyone who comes for our democracy. Help me continue that work in the Senate with a contribution today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230106-1?refcode=em20230106-1-8200&refcode2=8200_434096_4VktA4&akid=8200%2E434096%2E4VktA4)**
Thank you for your support.
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230106-8200-footer&t=1&refcode2=8200_434096_4VktA4&akid=8200%2E434096%2E4VktA4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The truth is, the attack on our democracy started long before the violent insurrection that took place on January 6, 2021.
#
Derek -
Two years ago today, our Capitol was attacked by domestic terrorists determined to destroy our democracy.
But the truth is, the attack on our democracy started long before the violent insurrection that took place on January 6, 2021.
The far-right attacks our democracy when they make it harder for people to vote: often young people, people of color and Veterans who vote by mail.
The far-right attacks our democracy when they gerrymander legislative districts into crazy contortions so they can pick their voters as opposed to voters picking their elected officials.
The far-right attacks our democracy when they relentlessly attack and attempt to discredit the institutions that allow it to function.
And do you think that’s going to stop anytime soon?
Of course not.
Veterans and Military families play a key role in fighting back against those attacks. They've served and sacrificed to defend our democracy, and are the trusted voices to protect it here at home.
We saw it in VoteVets' powerful ads. We see it in news coverage at home. But we cannot do that alone. So please. On today, of all days, we are asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We will put your donation right to work fighting back against the far-right attacks on our democracy. We’ll elevate the voices of those who served, and we will win.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230106-1-15&t=1&akid=7263%2E3013755%2EMu1LbD)

clean_body: The truth is, the attack on our democracy started long before the violent insurrection that took place on January 6, 2021. Derek - Two years ago today, our Capitol was attacked by domestic terrorists determined to destroy our democracy. But the truth is, the attack on our democracy started long before the violent insurrection that took place on January 6, 2021. The far-right attacks our democracy when they make it harder for people to vote: often young people, people of color and Veterans who vote by mail. The far-right attacks our democracy when they gerrymander legislative districts into crazy contortions so they can pick their voters as opposed to voters picking their elected officials. The far-right attacks our democracy when they relentlessly attack and attempt to discredit the institutions that allow it to function. And do you think that’s going to stop anytime soon? Of course not. Veterans and Military families play a key role in fighting back against those attacks. They've served and sacrificed to defend our democracy, and are the trusted voices to protect it here at home. We saw it in VoteVets' powerful ads. We see it in news coverage at home. But we cannot do that alone. So please. Help us build power from the ground up — block by block | | | Our New Year’s resolution is the same as always, Peter: **to keep on organizing towards a better future for us all.** We have big plans in store for 2023 — it's a local election year, and in the months ahead, we’ll be vetting, training, and supporting a down-ballot bench of progressive candidates for city council, school board, and other local offices across Pennsylvania. **As a party by and for working people, we want you to be involved in this process and have a say in who we throw our support behind.** [**Join us Wednesday, January 11th at 5:30 PM ET via Zoom to learn more about our endorsement process in Pennsylvania and how you can participate!**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDNWRcqQSiEpwMz5EnjOyrzaglH-rUw5tNIfib2u7YWOeXQ10ghhlPmPPD4GYfMwrAs1FFO17EDQEyJiz93ZBLV_TLL6xr-MeJR0D8GxX6YnrRVX818kNNLl_RYcxz3yUSbnI6xmICr1EAljvxojrxoiyXcgpSU91Uf4ILB48DC8zUE7HtAjLH_qFqabvsPUDAmQu5WcwdIeKyg4Te9S_EhcONAK74mqX__tIq-tF6V1s2KuqOszspACorJge65u4Ng/3sm/R9XNEowbQlSdK963sKUSTg/h0/V8xDI1tTv5igoLxWy72tnTURSq7IqrQDmHjMOEi7G7Q) **[Join us](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDNWRcqQSiEpwMz5EnjOyrzaglH-rUw5tNIfib2u7YWOeXQ10ghhlPmPPD4GYfMwrAs1FFO17EDQEyJiz93ZBLV8QP3Z-c5In5Bs96l1GoM4Z6s3lmWuffbY2rU9aHkI4j8HR4y-NQ_fOmHDBB4079IY5xsdMrUQKB3WccFQzY1fFuPlHV2Oq3tDERUDlJmsb7edPTI8i90oJSxAAAtTqtCBXWSLhJu1EMFY7BEdewosDE72ODNoBixptNOm8GK9P-A/3sm/R9XNEowbQlSdK963sKUSTg/h1/9nClxXq7wttgss7TxZJVNp6SA3H_icYSXvVrk73bg-w)** This meeting is open to anyone who wants to see a change in their community and be part of our movement to build power from the ground up, block by block. body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| The last time my opponent Duane Adams ran for state office in Virginia's Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat in Hanover County against beloved Conservative Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove. In fact, he ran for state office three times as a Democrat.
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NpNmmlIWk2ADPIgwxyZrqaz9tsFoJ8rai1uugzYzJ2eRspX8pvX1AnVSe1jhDTunFQlyRj5xgStBtpgGyFn7VFB8EQogyPY_g==&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==) to read a letter with the facts sent to us from fellow Conservative Republican VA State Senator (retired) Dick Black:
Fact: President Ronald Reagan never hid the fact that he once voted Democrat before becoming a Republican and he never ever ran for election anywhere in the United States as a Democrat.
The General Assembly will begin session in Richmond January 11. Here is a list 2023 Legislation my team and I have Filed So far:

* [HB 1436 Income tax, state; military benefits subtraction, age restriction.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91Ni7w-SjZxa7UG8rkQV0nbw8wjr-LSQGEptSdsKSKUiANatjsttYTZ1FkfdOXzGG80NfdZSnkzN_h9_4lJRBb1nbicBNQ14ks7JTMYamcdjxkrQxz-gSNEXi9A-CzQTSLoesE4QpSKmsFoOvUAax_io=&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==) *
* [HB 1454 Home instruction; removes certain criteria for parents.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNnNYFKgesME_YG72YyncMw5-BVsm1un6G5wlghJQEMOo4R5K0iq0GwYUWZNb2qtRmwhFh78QZN1rU9ZS3QeGpohOUsGED6X6BoGgZfiCIzkNWBb-mDT1i6dMIUVd4VsH8f6r8nMWHZ4S8=&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==) *
* [HB 1488 Abortion; use of public funds prohibited.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNnMsrZHIH9qcU9_39dhKiFSLLv4uxNo0D0GVat2PS5vgKGwMRSQHhdGedujzik97Ax7ZlQXqgaIaGF8h1Nmw5ADuOFtaMip_JqDK_qyhXxHwzwBoOCYy7K2QUlYVJXcG6_09wQHedlHqs=&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==) *
* [HB 1507 Public elementary and secondary schools; fundamental right of parents.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNnM8aSVsXnnnt-lc5Zi6yNm8w0Cc9QGKX_OTZP1eRwXOg1LxyphZVyWhG06hB6jIsx5anGE7nrs9NJSKMNtBpj2mOpBpgae2NMqFaJ9et_Tgft5E9yhYBHDm7GKpCE54E6x0qViH34ahU=&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==) *
* [HJ 475 Career and Technical Education Letter of Intent Signing Day; designating as 4th Wed. in April 2023.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNnesh3Zm1HopzPH9SAcSJwQGEctsTSbApN-7mpM_VIonSTAjXz2DE7zzKhb4LZhOUgWrEjzjq7TqlvOZznLOsa9zqQrKch0EHhPiq0qjmDB5Jm3Gu1UR8UU-saVWeER7d9Sw0PjaCrsbs=&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==) *

| State Senate D 10 Campaign Kickoff
---
|
---
| Tomorrow, our campaign kickoff for Virginia State Senate District 10 is January 7, 2023, 11am to 2pm at Sportspage Bar and Grill, [36 Broad Street Rd Manakin Sabot, VA 23103](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNny8Gjw1vQVUzwGH40or3g24MQYe2jtsIyiBoTc2aZebVGdLOCYK8U51unr7-QkTUAbff1ZrhaH0l5ftwVqO4FRyopmCTZ5BMs7nbMueIxX5NL5uSvoYggfao1Yni0l2tumvPZQRS-S_H-GZolu9_BCeAoDDqIaI793pUrAb4LUl6ayaIbdYGBDnHMGoOXfmovuCklL8kF6Rb0Tfqo5Zfsvg==&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==). We will have some amazing conservative speakers, including E.W.Jackson, Sandy Rios, and Senator Amanda Chase. RSVP to [j](mailto:brittonross9@gmail.com)ohn@mcguireforvirginia.com

Here is some of what I've been up to around the district and some of what's on my mind.

| Thank You, Governor Youngkin!

| Way to go, Governor Youngkin! I will always fight to make sure our children are number one! Governor Youngkin calls on Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares to investigate Thomas Jefferson High School for withholding Merit Based Science and Technology Awards. See his interview on Tucker Carlson here. Here is the link to watch the interview [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=79msjGL5SjQ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNn7sIE65iximd-QeqGYODiHS4lsLtIZ079gLxM7ZzkpMRv4836QjMV8zGfzkzIAPI0xINQ19qd7RiVrWu9LZvOaM25nvQEa0f7G2mOfP9MIh9P8kB7sRMBWQ==&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==)

| I have always been on board with Education Savings Accounts (ESA) and I'm glad to see the Youngkin administration is pushing for school choice. Our children are number one and the one-size-fits-all method is failing our kids. [Click here t](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNnFy4Hq-ja-zBUSrkXxJfDgftAeJoTrsWWTce62l5rYXs2pDTvbciOA4U0Ui5ER_hxJsjcs-K13lIsctvJwz1aglA3kfV7fWk0_5q8lHvBJr_tQQgGQFYljJpxPLHwUKBaNaqRbpWP8CwAAHSotQt-FJpPgxoNMu9iM1JApMKhtV3qGI3Nyn1ONtdJ1RmSd6dh1tCQhy-F_8ihDfBKLY5iOn9WgMl-yBp32DogeqLycmspVjZSss_GOEh1L4fW6vZ9miJpDDeWSMHW8KqSHPq7uU1YlsLJGZoK&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==)o hear Lieutenant Governor speak on School Choice.
---
| Buckingham County Christmas McGuire Meet and Greet
---
|
---
|
---
| We had a wonderful time meeting folks in Buckingham County while celebrating Christmas with children, Santa Claus and more. The Grinch wasn't very popular with the 5-year-olds so we told him to take a hike! Thank you very much to all the volunteers and folks in Buckingham for introducing us to your friends. Tracy and I had a great time!
---
| Louisa County Sheriff Christmas Party
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Tracy and I had a wonderful time at the Louisa County Sheriff Christmas Party. Thank you to our law enforcement, dispatchers, and everyone else for working hard to keep our community safe!
---
| Teresa's Place Buckingham
---
|
---
| Tracy and I stopped by Teresa's Place in Buckingham County for lunch. Please support local businesses who are still dealing with the aftermath of the unconstitutional shutdowns and supply chain issues.
---
| A Christmas Party in Goochland
---
|
---
| We met some wonderful folks in Goochland. Thank you for sharing your home and introducing us to your friends.
---
| Amanda Adams Goochland Circuit Court Clerk
---
|
---
|
---
| On December 20, 2022, principal deputy [Amanda S. Adams](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNnhsZG5wvaHr6H9t0p6Bx9Jd9BuoHg6rk1YjaQgqGFpPPsOGWTDRkgMlf-TQ6DdNtIzsf9BcJNhNc1k6EzL1YcOA==&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==) was sworn in as clerk of the Goochland County Circuit Court effective January 1, 2023 to fill in the unexpired term of Dale Agnew who retired on 31 December 2022. Adams has served in the clerk office for eight years and Dale Agnew retires after serving in the clerks office since 1982. Dale Agnew was Clerk of the Court since 2014. Congratulations to Amanda Adams on your appointment to Goochland County Circuit Court Clerk, and congratulations to Dale Agnew on her well-deserved retirement.
---
| Ronnie Campbell Funeral
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GCWPz83B9Da_ixHXoL0HYuErIGAMmHNddxVKySHa9kVPZV8lzyZ91NhVjz1-IyNnabcGpAv1b4zVGtwu8ayPOE9BrrdKSQCmQnaBNE3YBKiwpMnzVwVV1PpmRJlBFD2l_b57FsJs45pcLMDVOmg6mLdxVHm14ypS&c=1HqpEcdjzc31zKKQhVmoD4dHc8_Ddlp_RDYPKpZFidbQlSyrbkYaKg==&ch=Umbh5m4H-JLkuz71MplyoWMCTVtoP6iKFnl8IK1-UW27SOXBMv6XGQ==)

| I attended the funeral of our friend and fellow delegate, Ronnie Campbell, on December 21st. We are extremely sad to see him go. | Father/Son Small Business Louisa County
---
|
---
| I was in a pinch with a tire issue over the holidays, while campaigning in Senate District 10. Thankfully, Billy and his son, Les, of Community Motor Company in Louisa County got me in, and back on the campaign trail in no time. Billy's father started the shop in 1940. They must have a reputation for great customer service, because people kept coming in and delivering apple pies, cookies, and more for Christmas. Please support local business. They are located at 416 West Main Street, Louisa VA 23093.

| A Message from the Buckingham GOP: The Buckingham County Republican Committee is having a fundraiser until Monday, January 9th, 2023, for a 2017 "White House Christmas" Ornament from President Trump's first Christmas in the White House. The person who has the highest donation to the Buckingham County Republican Committee by Monday, January 9th, 2023 by 5pm will win the ornament. You may contact Chairwoman Ramona Christian at 434-391-4546. [ramonachristian862@gmail.com](mailto:ramonachristian862@gmail.com)
Donations may also be made through CASH APP: $BuckinghamCountyGOP

clean_body: | | | | | | | The last time my opponent Duane Adams ran for state office in Virginia's Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat in Hanover County against beloved Conservative Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove. In fact, he ran for state office three times as a Democrat. == to read a letter with the facts sent to us from fellow Conservative Republican VA State Senator (retired) Dick Black: Fact: President Ronald Reagan never hid the fact that he once voted Democrat before becoming a Republican and he never ever ran for election anywhere in the United States as a Democrat. The General Assembly will begin session in Richmond January 11. Here is a list 2023 Legislation my team and I have Filed So far: == == == == == | State Senate D 10 Campaign Kickoff | | Tomorrow, our campaign kickoff for Virginia State Senate District 10 is January 7, 2023, 11am to 2pm at Sportspage Bar and Grill, ==. We will have some amazing conservative speakers, including E.W.Jackson, Sandy Rios, and Senator Amanda Chase. RSVP to mailto:brittonross9@gmail.comohn@mcguireforvirginia.com Here is some of what I've been up to around the district and some of what's on my mind. | Thank You, Governor Youngkin! | == | Way to go, Governor Youngkin! I will always fight to make sure our children are number one! Governor Youngkin calls on Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares to investigate Thomas Jefferson High School for withholding Merit Based Science and Technology Awards. See his interview on Tucker Carlson here. Here is the link to watch the interview == | Governor Youngkin Pushes School Choice | == | I have always been on board with Education Savings Accounts (ESA) and I'm glad to see the Youngkin administration is pushing for school choice. Our children are number one and the one-size-fits-all method is failing our kids. hear Lieutenant Governor speak on School Choice. | Buckingham County Christmas McGuire Meet and Greet | | | We had a wonderful time meeting folks in Buckingham County while celebrating Christmas with children, Santa Claus and more. The Grinch wasn't very popular with the 5-year-olds so we told him to take a hike! Thank you very much to all the volunteers and folks in Buckingham for introducing us to your friends. Tracy and I had a great time! | Louisa County Sheriff Christmas Party | | | | | Tracy and I had a wonderful time at the Louisa County Sheriff Christmas Party. Thank you to our law enforcement, dispatchers, and everyone else for working hard to keep our community safe! | Teresa's Place Buckingham | | Tracy and I stopped by Teresa's Place in Buckingham County for lunch. Please support local businesses who are still dealing with the aftermath of the unconstitutional shutdowns and supply chain issues. | A Christmas Party in Goochland | | We met some wonderful folks in Goochland. Thank you for sharing your home and introducing us to your friends. | Amanda Adams Goochland Circuit Court Clerk | | | On December 20, 2022, principal deputy == was sworn in as clerk of the Goochland County Circuit Court effective January 1, 2023 to fill in the unexpired term of Dale Agnew who retired on 31 December 2022. Adams has served in the clerk office for eight years and Dale Agnew retires after serving in the clerks office since 1982. Dale Agnew was Clerk of the Court since 2014. Congratulations to Amanda Adams on your appointment to Goochland County Circuit Court Clerk, and congratulations to Dale Agnew on her well-deserved retirement. | Ronnie Campbell Funeral | == | I attended the funeral of our friend and fellow delegate, Ronnie Campbell, on December 21st. We are extremely sad to see him go. His wife, Ellen Campbell, announced she is running for his seat in the House of Delegates. Please go and support her by praying, volunteering and voting for her on January 10th. To learn more about her please visit her website: == | VCDL University Kickoff Event Meeting | == | It was an honor to speak on the importance of defending our 2nd amendment rights at the VCDL-U, or the Virginia Citizens Defense League University kickoff event on December 21. Learn more here: VCDL.org/page/VCDL-U | Father/Son Small Business Louisa County | | I was in a pinch with a tire issue over the holidays, while campaigning in Senate District 10. Thankfully, Billy and his son, Les, of Community Motor Company in Louisa County got me in, and back on the campaign trail in no time. Billy's father started the shop in 1940. They must have a reputation for great customer service, because people kept coming in and delivering apple pies, cookies, and more for Christmas. Please support local business. They are located at 416 West Main Street, Louisa VA 23093. | Yael Levin Campaign Kickoff Hanover | | | I had the honor of introducing Yael Levin for Ashland Supervisor. There was a lot of excitement and a great turnout. Thank you, Yael for stepping up to serve! | Happy New Year! | | Happy New Year, and may the Lord bless you and your family in 2023.We replaced our Merry Christmas message on top of our campaign signs in ten counties with, "Happy Year!!!" Have you seen them around the district? | Buckingham County GOP Fundraiser | | A Message from the Buckingham GOP: The Buckingham County Republican Committee is having a fundraiser until Monday, January 9th, 2023, for a 2017 "White House Christmas" Ornament from President Trump's first Christmas in the White House. The person who has the highest donation to the Buckingham County Republican Committee by Monday, January 9th, 2023 by 5pm will win the ornament. You may contact Chairwoman Ramona Christian at 434-391-4546. mailto:ramonachristian862@gmail.com Donations may also be made through CASH APP: $BuckinghamCountyGOP | Family Time | | Our son, John, and his fiancee, Emily, made it home for the Holidays! They are pictured with Tracy, Remi, and me. | We will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. Please == and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP. | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | | | | == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Mid December == End of November == Mid November == End of October == Mid October == September == End of August == Mid August == End of July == == == == Mid June == May == April == March == Week 9 == Week 8. == Week 7 == Week 6. == Week 5. == Week 4. == Week 3. == Week 2. == Week 1 == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

clean_body: A TOTAL MESS. A TOTAL MESS. | Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she'd ever get caught. She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win. Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots. My team can't win this fight alone. Blood, sweat, and tears will only get us so far. Can you spare ANYTHING to help me and my team fight for YOU? | God Bless you, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. name: Letitia James
subject: Will you join me in congratulating Congressman Hakeem Jeffries?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, this week, history was made.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002403/386562041/265476937?code=jtk946-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzFlZGRkZS0wZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZnRm2YIka4azZTIvCsHKjm56sNtpunc5WK_MfpUSAN4=)
---
Peter, this week, history was made.

**My dear friend Congressman Hakeem Jeffries was elected as the House Democratic Leader. He is the first Black lawmaker EVER to lead a party in Congress.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002404/386562043/1764917348?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-2023-hj-congrats%3F&code=jtk946-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzFlZGRkZS0wZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZnRm2YIka4azZTIvCsHKjm56sNtpunc5WK_MfpUSAN4=&emci=8a629002-e68d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=831eddde-0e8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
| | [Sign the card](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002405/386562044/1764917348?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-2023-hj-congrats%3F&code=jtk946-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzFlZGRkZS0wZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZnRm2YIka4azZTIvCsHKjm56sNtpunc5WK_MfpUSAN4=&emci=8a629002-e68d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=831eddde-0e8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Hakeem Jeffries didn’t grow up with power or privilege. He was raised by working class parents in Brooklyn and received his education through the New York City public school system.

Does that sound familiar?

Peter, Hakeem and I have a lot in common: As Black people born and raised in Brooklyn, we had to fight every day to achieve our potential – **and now, we’re fighting to provide**** _every_ ****person with the opportunities we created for ourselves.**

I’m proud to celebrate Congressman Jeffries’ historic accomplishment – and I hope you’ll join me, Peter. So please, before I send off this card first thing in the morning:

**[Will you take 30 seconds to commemorate this special moment by adding your signature to Congressman Jeffries’ card? I want to try to get 5,000 signatures before midnight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002406/386562045/1764917348?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-2023-hj-congrats%3F&code=jtk946-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzFlZGRkZS0wZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZnRm2YIka4azZTIvCsHKjm56sNtpunc5WK_MfpUSAN4=&emci=8a629002-e68d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=831eddde-0e8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Sign the card](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002407/386562046/1764917348?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-2023-hj-congrats%3F&code=jtk946-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzFlZGRkZS0wZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZnRm2YIka4azZTIvCsHKjm56sNtpunc5WK_MfpUSAN4=&emci=8a629002-e68d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=831eddde-0e8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you,

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Border=20Security=20Coalition?=
subject: He's finally coming... now let's greet him!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0a0a553148&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,It has just been announced that after FIFTY YEARS in elected office, Joe Biden will be paying a visit to our Southern Border. **Too little, too late?** Joe’s open border policies have allowed 4.5 million illegal aliens to come into our country since he took over the White House. In just two months in my town of El Paso, 209,000 illegals have been detained over the last 2 months. **TWO MONTHS!****So, when Biden comes down to visit this border, the Border Security Coalition definitely wants to give him a welcome... We want him to SEE what he has done! We want to make sure that he FULLY comprehends the crisis that he’s caused.****AND WE NEED YOU TO HELP US!**
| [SUPORT THE BORDER SECURITY COALITION TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=882d18d787&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Irene Armendariz-Jackson, a lifelong resident of El Paso. My parents LEGALLY immigrated here from Mexico. My husband is a Border Patrol agent who had to retire due to Biden’s insane vaccine mandates. I know this issue of the border and I’ve run for Congress to try to fix it.The establishment hates me because neither party ACTUALLY wants to fix the Border issue. It’s sad but true. We have some good politicians who do want to fix it but when you get to the establishment types... they’re blocking us at every instance.That’s what the Border Security Coalition is for. Our PAC is going to fund candidates who have a concrete plan to secure our border and **DEFEAT** those who want to continue the mass invasion.
| [CLICK HERE: SUPPORT A SECURE BORDER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2d72f0479a&e=fdefed58de)
---
By the time Joe Biden visits this border I want to be able to send him a huge message with our PAC. We need to raise $8,500 from this email today to hit our goal. We want to show the establishments of BOTH parties that if they don’t secure our borders, we will defeat them.The only language these people understand is money, so we need to speak what they understand. That’s why I’m asking you for your donation today. We want to be able to say that we have an organization supported by THOUSANDS of like-minded patriots who will NOT support any candidate without a plan to stop the invasion.So, whether it was $5.00 or $500, we need your support today. There is power in numbers. There is no organization like ours. We can do this, but you’re going to have to help us. Click below and let’s stop the invasion of America.
| [DONATE $5.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=24f1ba2ba7&e=fdefed58de)
---

The very existence of America depends on our success. Let’s make sure that we handle this now before it’s too late... and honestly, it really is almost too late.Sincerely,Irene Armendariz-Jackson

subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002729/386563203/1328194270?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230106_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDU4NGE0Mi0xMThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwPGmDS3tAF8vZnSU_sd3TGFHgqg98vdq98_rO5h6oA=&emci=32e54eb8-f78d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b0584a42-118e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) | Simply put, no one is above the law in America. Not even the former President.

Two years ago today, a violent mob terrorized our nation’s Capitol in a desperate attempt to prevent Congress from certifying the results of the 2020 presidential election. This was an attack on our Democracy.

Over the past year, the January 6th Committee proved that a bipartisan and fact based approach can restore our faith in Democracy. However, the work isn’t done yet.

With Republicans having control of the House and the Supreme Court, the Justice Department must step up and hold every single person accountable for their actions. _**[Sign our petition today if you agree with me and urge the Justice Department to protect our Democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002730/386563204/-1416765885?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230106_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDU4NGE0Mi0xMThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwPGmDS3tAF8vZnSU_sd3TGFHgqg98vdq98_rO5h6oA=&emci=32e54eb8-f78d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b0584a42-118e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=30096098)**_ [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002731/386563205/-1416765885?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230106_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDU4NGE0Mi0xMThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwPGmDS3tAF8vZnSU_sd3TGFHgqg98vdq98_rO5h6oA=&emci=32e54eb8-f78d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b0584a42-118e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) Multiple news outlets have shed light on the Republican House leaders who voted against certifying the 2020 election and repeatedly obstructed the investigation into the deadly failed attack on our country on January 6th.

I am committed to protecting American democracy and setting an example of true leadership by standing up to anyone who would violate and terrorize our nation’s values. _**[Sign your name today if you’re with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57002732/386563206/-1416765885?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230106_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDU4NGE0Mi0xMThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwPGmDS3tAF8vZnSU_sd3TGFHgqg98vdq98_rO5h6oA=&emci=32e54eb8-f78d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b0584a42-118e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=30096098)**_

Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she'd ever get caught.

She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win.

Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots.

clean_body: A TOTAL MESS. A TOTAL MESS. | Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she'd ever get caught. She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win. Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots. My team can't win this fight alone. Blood, sweat, and tears will only get us so far. Can you spare ANYTHING to help me and my team fight for YOU? | God Bless you, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.
