| | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgofmbvt8qs4tk237l4sem8o88mpshmrkl5bst30_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p31cdh2bs)
---
| | | | Friend,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn’t someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it... _**I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR _AGAINST_ KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!**_
---
| [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5fmfs8t9usqle77ud2m0778d59smjjae1m4kmb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p31cdh2bs "JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY")
---
| That’s right – as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this: **If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!** But that’s exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership... We’re talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog. Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country. Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year. _Someone who’s so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them..._ **And I will not sit by as the preferred ‘Republican’ of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street – the man who believes in NOTHING – receives his undeserved coronation.** This town is broken, fellow patriot. [We won’t fix it unless we demand change.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt7209kohbu3kaa8l23ae7jqbh7mvsm4ftj945j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p31cdh2bs) And that’s why I’m standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp’s attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals! **I need to know if you’ll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin’ McCarthy Speakership. If you’re a “NO” Vote like I am... Please make that _LOUD AND CLEAR_ by clicking the button below!**
---
| [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztrj6kpis0b2irj8l012s048766l7f7mquusu9do_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p31cdh2bs "SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!")
---
| Here’s why it’s so important that I get your backing on this... The Establishment “Only Kevin” crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to _REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM OUR COMMITTEES_ if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!! We triggered the Swamp, and they’re coming back with the vengeance. In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? →](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8bkhgrabp4s2q6md36g7em2iraj1jlbjikudn0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p31cdh2bs) This is a fight worth having, friend. I’d be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsnffq8719j58pcjn3irjjsjigl1iso3slg6s9so_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p31cdh2bs "DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.")
---
|

**Thanks for fighting with me,**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z89984hgkjos1os7losntvl7aqpjet3v86uv6880_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p31cdh2bs)
---
| _**Matt Gaetz**_ _**Republican, Florida's 1st District**_
---
|
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1l0guo4ds81ki66p716uu9iusnb56iuuf25480_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0m11ob6jgiamtvalvbgc470gtko8bng9mjtaco_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2i1m2vj9s53ffkmbad11a3svv8n6l7ou1h7h598_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrmch1raf283fhtllns69ebh5of1f5trtjskdaso_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z63jch99kej4vga9nqh7ke3tpo2imt10fp4doqv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfmm6na2qr3t377k4hitkmupafkhaa069krdhq80_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1kfgjno7shj3dcbm92dv5utn6rsksf238g4ung_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkf4u26rgk7l6jo4p147fhqko4qgt0b7adfnvhj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmenehgb1bcab6s8n9s51s6d9gkqlkdrk6nbiksg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zubb8fq53u6kqk7bhrj8i5nge33it2oi0k4up0kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb8g77r0ft5jeluqbrsrkuoa4q8n5764h3ih5pho_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvqnoit3ki9ehjtqi4cb5lbakg8lmc5r2f21e6m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrosut7mmh9hfk40g967drqq88gi94ct9i8g8ug8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z59sv8n368gnqah4ll0ql48g7g70902eh01m4mjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5l56ltknie6bfto9d32kr8svkir48hf3s8mpft0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9jlv0qjrimnpgfrrq79qcv9qppe7ln6akomh38_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp895mfq6fsacmnuctrausl5sqasn3c6ofpkaa6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcl24flu3s4o1f6q42rv3n8fkia6dgha91bqaipg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1gm1p30chh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zkm2k2d7gvmod0o0231ulr9qhor19cadsr31jne8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team DASS
subject: Two Years Ago Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
At this moment two years ago today, we watched in horror as Rioters infiltrated the United States Capitol - all in an attempt to halt the democratic process.
Those on the frontlines lost their lives. Dozens were injured. And our democracy was dealt an indelible scar that will forever cloud our nation’s history.
Almost immediately afterwards, we saw the cowardice of Trump’s GOP as they refused to hold him accountable. And even worse, many doubled down on the Big Lie by running on the sole platform that the election was stolen.
One after the other, these election-deniers won their primaries and were inches from winning critical races, including the Office of the Secretary of State in multiple swing states.
But folks, they failed last November. Voters rejected those who vowed to subvert our democracy. Our candidates won.
As we look back on the last two years, we must recognize that our democracy is fragile - and it’s still under threat. Election deniers are still active. And they’re already gearing up for 2024. We must lay the groundwork now to defeat them.
That’s why we’re asking you to chip in anything you can to defend democracy, defeat election deniers, and elect Democratic Secretaries of State. Can you chip in now? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan23?refcode=em_fr_010623_b1_jan6_30ac&amount=25]

Those on the frontlines lost their lives. Dozens were injured. And our democracy was dealt an indelible scar that will forever cloud our nation’s history. Almost immediately afterwards, we saw the cowardice of Trump’s GOP as they refused to hold him accountable. And even worse, many doubled down on the Big Lie by running on the sole platform that the election was stolen. subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e236e6b98b94623a1d728944207f45a&_e=EHAlpagMzA2Y44GlEhlwmjSVUThsTG6CojuSkCnTesS6rvZYFJzot34vFc0P5QAcwLk9wMngzdrkb2SENCl3MfP_Q6EB1rbWkcMlN7mDS0tGCzBp4ZyWUDExB3yq9uo2nOKiT9_uTsfS9_Gqq-tI5V41Edl-VarzyW9iNqlt8zPh8igEWBev6Zm67xN57q-Is2u3KOnjlIUmyRUBBleHGkGfYHv6ZT9VWt1SZp8JqQKi8Ik1xLoHpj7U4bywFMwW8vVLoLXT2_7L8xL5-w-iDfBRcFlkIFCposR1MRsMY7kespWht8fa-ZaRMoy8qzr-eTXDDlhOmzOj3kZzWxZXQzy_OsmHHLEfYLh1OrVvhZX3wI7EPVsCq85tFqT2nAbn)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. And I'm writing today because there has never been a more critical time to advance freedom in America. So let's seize the momentum by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e236e6b98b94623a1d728944207f45a&_e=EHAlpagMzA2Y44GlEhlwmjSVUThsTG6CojuSkCnTesS6rvZYFJzot34vFc0P5QAcwLk9wMngzdrkb2SENCl3MfP_Q6EB1rbWkcMlN7mDS0tGCzBp4ZyWUDExB3yq9uo2nOKiT9_uTsfS9_Gqq-tI5V41Edl-VarzyW9iNqlt8zPh8igEWBev6Zm67xN57q-Is2u3KOnjlIUmyRUBBleHGkGfYHv6ZT9VWt1SZp8JqQJkun-OzVdgpbxvudVYSvV8v5Ou_cvfWWU3bb-9k0ChiUxTJWDpBpcc8QCaxsKoAGt03Gf-bhkrX1Eet4vTFqOhBq2bYM79gWCD6n5inAA2FDeiaRnU3ITppNMLCgctKODrsuaWyuhxiqqhIaLXZ31v) Before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e236e6b98b94623a1d728944207f45a&_e=EHAlpagMzA2Y44GlEhlwmjSVUThsTG6CojuSkCnTesS6rvZYFJzot34vFc0P5QAcwLk9wMngzdrkb2SENCl3MfP_Q6EB1rbWkcMlN7mDS0tGCzBp4ZyWUDExB3yq9uo2nOKiT9_uTsfS9_Gqq-tI5V41Edl-VarzyW9iNqlt8zPh8igEWBev6Zm67xN57q-Is2u3KOnjlIUmyRUBBleHGkGfYHv6ZT9VWt1SZp8JqQJqHzKOe0PS_xlta3Ji1mYck2Hfhhz3jaE1EkrDzq0b8pKqUfOvGs_WeVkJaYynDO542dZiqnp6jlJr27luWhfW3VayVHF0bCtmoG714qHXaUxnh59S0CgaEp9FHpc86fe2a_qPeJs4719BTiJQFzYz)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e236e6b98b94623a1d728944207f45a&_e=EHAlpagMzA2Y44GlEhlwmjSVUThsTG6CojuSkCnTesS6rvZYFJzot34vFc0P5QAcwLk9wMngzdrkb2SENCl3MfP_Q6EB1rbWkcMlN7mDS0tGCzBp4ZyWUDExB3yq9uo2nOKiT9_uTsfS9_Gqq-tI5V41Edl-VarzyW9iNqlt8zPh8igEWBev6Zm67xN57q-Is2u3KOnjlIUmyRUBBleHGkGfYHv6ZT9VWt1SZp8JqQJlD3joiKwdzbp_7wrWNxPtcAGLNdOIcvt4AFwJ3nSCV9A6K0LFBew4kt6Ao_BQ4WJ_1tSCy3A1jyfAvG9V8aww_o15mf-PO4qT_uuE-Uw9xmRJQCkBbHQPIkf1KnGvVFGNO_8dxWjwPgrjzc0rUVi9)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* In 2023, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e236e6b98b94623a1d728944207f45a&_e=EHAlpagMzA2Y44GlEhlwmjSVUThsTG6CojuSkCnTesS6rvZYFJzot34vFc0P5QAcwLk9wMngzdrkb2SENCl3MfP_Q6EB1rbWkcMlN7mDS0tGCzBp4ZyWUDExB3yq9uo2nOKiT9_uTsfS9_Gqq-tI5V41Edl-VarzyW9iNqlt8zPh8igEWBev6Zm67xN57q-Is2u3KOnjlIUmyRUBBleHGkGfYHv6ZT9VWt1SZp8JqQJWGZesxptG04PxQmXhXneWUdWsrp2oKSXvZDHIylO0HkIlwnjPoUDUTMcBFv5Gjcv8VCllAfk9Yau1_PxqWLTnK_xIc1tfB1DicZEeoQvKBDUH2o4fWo9qq7KVrabCHVcmdijLMu_rZtbMJalWt9Tb)

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e236e6b98b94623a1d728944207f45a&_e=EHAlpagMzA2Y44GlEhlwmjSVUThsTG6CojuSkCnTesS6rvZYFJzot34vFc0P5QAcwLk9wMngzdrkb2SENCl3MfP_Q6EB1rbWkcMlN7mDS0tGCzBp4ZyWUDExB3yq9uo2nOKiT9_uTsfS9_Gqq-tI5V41Edl-VarzyW9iNqlt8zPh8igEWBev6Zm67xN57q-Is2u3KOnjlIUmyRUBBleHGkGfYHv6ZT9VWt1SZp8JqQJw9FAuutIVmj-JBWwfHMwimjBqrl2OMQa3zvk6tQRzPtF24m298gjoztE-KZn1GZERR0WyrUrZoBXrUV4OOnEF5HhrIosDBQ8wqo2nzBnd38SlQqw123jfgisUgdKtvRAgUA9tybKzP1ugHSBl7Vwe)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

Crouch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997946/386540380/1318384964?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) and [Mike Braun](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997947/386540381/-143608129?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535), Governor Eric Holcomb [admitted](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997948/386540382/1899110248?t=2599&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) Republicans’ policies have been failing Hoosier families. _ This week during Governor Eric Holcomb’s 2023 “Next Level” agenda rollout, Holcomb [acknowledged](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997949/386540383/898096061?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) that Hoosiers are burdened by high childcare costs, a burgeoning state brain drain, a struggling education system, and dismal healthcare and maternal mortality rankings - all of which happened under Republican leadership over the last two decades. **It’s simple: Republicans have failed Hoosiers and are diminishing Indiana’s future. ** As a reminder, here’s where Indiana stands on issues like quality-of-life and education - thanks to the Indiana GOP: **❌**[F Rated Quality-of-Life](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997950/386540384/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)
**❌**[C- Rated Education System](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997951/386540385/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)
**❌**[D- Rated Workforce](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997952/386540386/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)
**❌**[Third Worst Maternal Mortality in USA](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997953/386540387/-678275945?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) See INDems’ full release by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997954/386540388/1540148231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535). Please also check out an [op-ed by Chairman Mike _**Opportunities with INDems**_ **Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56997993/386540429/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU0OWYwOC1mNThkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YIZc8dltZKp9XwQTwI-UsJj2ngZofcuHG1F5a47zjE=&emci=f166aff4-da8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0de49f08-f58d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) **Executive Director** The Indiana Democratic Party (IDP) is seeking an Executive Director (ED) to lead our team. In partnership with the Chair and State Central Committee, the ED is responsible for deploying the strategy, overall management, and growth of IDP. The ED will be involved in all aspects of the Party’s operations, including but not limited to: election activities, voter protection, fundraising, budgeting, staff recruitment and retention, outreach, and building party infrastructure. General Duties:
* Responsible for overall operational efficiency of IDP, including staff and creation and execution of Party strategy.
* Recruits, interviews, hires, and manages IDP and coordinated campaign staff.
* Manages day-to-day work of Communications, Data & Organizing, Operations, and Finance teams.
* Oversees the day-to-day work of outside consultants and vendors.
* Serves as one of the spokespeople for IDP to the media.
* Other responsibilities as required.

Party Affairs
* Coordinates work and materials for the Democratic State Central Committee, District leaders, County leaders, and precinct committeemen and women.
* Keeps up strong relationships with various constituencies and stakeholders around the state, including organized labor, African-American leaders, Latino leaders, LGBTQ Hoosiers, women’s groups, Indiana Young Democrats, and College Democrats.
* Maintains close working relationships with various party partner organizations including, but not limited to: DNC, ASDC, DCCC, DSCC, DGA, and DLCC.
* Builds and nurtures relationships with Democratic candidates, elected officials, Democratic caucuses, and staff members across the state.
* Supports the building, growth, and success of county parties throughout the state.
* Oversees an annual party retreat, annual fundraising dinner, biennial state conventions, and the National Delegate Selection process for the 2024 Democratic convention.

Campaign & Election Activities
* Shares regular organizing, training, coaching, and other resources online and in-person for Party staff, volunteers, and party leadership.
* Works with IDP and Indiana Election Division to ensure the Party is up-to-date on the current and latest rules relating to elections and voting in Indiana.
* Troubleshoots any issues with campaigns or county parties on behalf of IDP to ensure the Party is represented well and that issues are resolved in a timely fashion.
* Oversees voter protection in-state and in partnership with DNC guidance.
* Oversees GOTV and Election Day efforts and events for IDP.

Fundraising
* Works with the State Chair to raise money for the party through call time, meetings, events, memberships, online giving, and other income generating streams.
* Partners with the finance team to create a robust apparatus for fundraising and cultivating large and small donors.
* Represents IDP at party, media, or community functions across the state.

Operations & Compliance
* Manages office and ensures campaigns and committees have productive workspaces.
* Keeps an updated and working knowledge of campaign finance, election, and compliance laws and works in concert with the compliance team and legal counsel to ensure all Party activities are consistently compliant.
* Works with the State Chair and Party CPA and Treasurer to implement the budget.

Qualifications: Minimum of at least four (4) years with direct campaign experience. Executive experience working on a coordinated campaign, statewide or Congressional political campaign, or with a state political party preferred.
* Experience managing a growing, diverse, and highly skilled team, with demonstrated ability to achieve high levels of performance and outcomes through guidance and management.
* A reputation for leading with integrity and making decisions with the input of the appropriate stakeholders.
* Experience building, managing, and tracking large budgets.
* Excellent verbal, written, and analytical skills.** **
* Ability to manage several tasks and projects at the same time.** **
* Ability to prioritize and multi-task in a fast-paced environment.** **
* Detail oriented and good follow through on tasks.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to interact professionally with staff and external stakeholders and represent the organization with professionalism.** **
* Ability to maintain a high level of confidentiality.

Salary: Salary is generally competitive and commensurate with experience. Position includes full medical, dental, and vision insurance benefits, a 401(k) account, and monthly tech stipend. Application Instructions:** ** Please email your resume and three professional references to [jobs@indems.org](mailto:jobs@indems.org) with “Executive Director” in the subject line. Thank you for your interest in working with IDP. ###

Bryan Kohberger, the 28-year-old criminal justice student accused of killing four University of Idaho undergrads, arrived at the Latah County Jail Wednesday evening. Just hours after Kohberger was flown from Pennsylvania, where he had been held since police took him into custody on December 30th, he was taken to the Latah Jail where he is being held in a separate holding cell.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Willie=20Montague?=
subject: The First Black Speaker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fredrick Douglass PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=26cdbd3f02&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,
There’s so much talk on Capitol Hill this week about the Speaker of the House. It’s one of the most important positions in all of our government with an incredible amount of power - so shouldn’t we make sure it goes to the right person?**Of course we should.** The process we’re seeing play out is something that I’m not mad about. Usually these things go on behind closed doors and we’re not allowed to see what happens. This time, it’s out in the open and twenty conservatives are fighting HARD for our values to be taken into consideration. **I’m with them.** I want to draw your attention to a specific moment though. When Byron Donalds was nominated on the Republican side, he was the **first** Black Republican nominated for House Speaker.He’s one of four Black Republicans in the House right now - and until the other day he was only one of two. **As a Black man myself, I hope you realize that’s somewhat of a problem.** The Republican Party has done more for Black prosperity and Black people than the Democrats... by far. The Democrats ONLY use them for votes in the worst possible way. **So why can we not get their votes? We have a serious outreach problem.**
| [CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT THE FREDRICK DOUGLASS PAC’S BLACK OUTREACH PROGRAMS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5b1d3f88b7&e=fdefed58de)
---
I want to draw your attention to something. Look at Georgia. The Governor’s race was won handily by Brian Kemp. Let’s talk about why that was.The Kemp campaign invested quite heavily in Black outreach and **DOUBLED** their percentage of Black voters that voted in their favor.Now, did they get a huge percent of Black votes? No. But they don’t need it. It’s a math game. With just 12% of the Black vote in the GOP column, Brian Kemp was able to get a **huge win** even against Stacey Abrams - a Black candidate.
| [INVEST IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9fc92b837a&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Willie Montague, I’m a Black man from Orlando Florida. I’m a pastor, activist and a lifelong Republican. I know that with the right amount of investment in Black outreach the GOP could secure MANY more victories across this nation... even in districts that we don’t typically think of.The issue? Our national GOP does **NOTHING** in terms of Black outreach. When I say Black outreach, I mean people on the ground... not just fancy Facebook ads and recruiting Black candidates. **You don’t even need to have a Black candidate to win Black votes. Look at the Democrats and Joe Biden.** Now, we’re not in an active election season so you might think the time for Black Outreach isn’t now? And **THAT** is where you’re wrong.Black voters HATE that Democrats only come around during election time. That’s why we need to be different. I need your investment in the Fredrick Douglass PAC **TODAY** so I can begin to organize our Black outreach programs to begin **IMMEDIATELY!** This huge Byron Donalds news is a perfect time. Did you see what Cori Bush said about Byron? Calling him a “prop” for white supremacy? Black people don’t respond well to that type of foolishness. **Our chance is now.****Rather than wait for the next election season to be a month away, let’s start NOW with our Black outreach programs!**
| [INVEST IMMEDIATELY BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9f9fb7bdee&e=fdefed58de)
---
I’ve put together programs like this before — and I’m ready to step up and do what the national GOP won’t do. We need grassroots organizations like mine to empower leaders & take the lead on Black outreach.Without some kind of “angel investor” we don’t have the funds to do it and we do it on a rag-tag budget, but, we’re now ready to take this to the next level and need your help.For our efforts this quarter, we need to raise about $13,000 more than we have in the bank right now to reach the amount of people we want to reach.Our organization is set up to receive contributions of up to $5,000 from any person, but you can also donate as little as $10.00 and make a big difference for us. **The bottom line is this — we saw what happened in the midterms. No Red Wave materialized. We need a new strategy. Help ME make the change in Black outreach for the GOP so that we can have *actual* victories again.** Click below and lend your support to this very important cause!
| [INVEST $25 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a07d450b0a&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [INVEST $50 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2fe80c1846&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [INVEST $100 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4ee94757b2&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [INVEST $250 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=56e1778d65&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [INVEST $500 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=42a5a6240e&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [INVEST $1,000 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7b68f4fee0&e=fdefed58de)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: Republican failure
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIIFw35C6fQFeQTKuNckTH1pIdyBYOUpKXJ6dcDWRuGHC9a9UtHHQzNBZ3JJSKmrt5TM0jp6eQaa_5P-hmE0aoZxH_1tmyzji2fmEQaQXRoFiOinLj71thd-qvVNu1M9CDzEY2zArKQPWh9-h47nmXi1MRMuqsorZwENq5Es3jCJlViAoPllABW-8Uir2f9djCgA-RakkoWENrJtUjp8uV6qrZnEQeMMxBFUEptat9HSTANIxnPDcG9xpHCerGrlvZCdKXdjzJ0oYu7njss-6ddfZwgUwhViq7fCBOZMPsVZCGddGfjmB8aQKkNZZdnC4RKpwzxep_1ICMbQT5DJb/3sm/3Q9RkdBZSgmSy7HtWKbyaQ/h0/IfXOArNiIh74iYJmhBUlBq0XECSfeqAgY5Wjccz6bxU)
---
Peter, Republicans have now failed 12 times to elect a Speaker of the House. This hasn’t happened in over 100 years. I’ll be blunt: Republicans are incapable of governing. And they’re putting politics over the American people. But if Democrats stick together in this historic moment, we have an opportunity to show how powerful we are. **[So, Peter, I still need 321 more donations to show that Democrats are united and ready to lead our country. body:
Help Kevin Adams win in the State Senate!! | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d23fdeb5f2&e=4955722b3e)

---
| Peter, I wanted to personally reach out and tell you about my friend Kevin Adams... and why he’s the best choice to fill my old State Senate seat...! A fellow Navy veteran, Kevin has worked tirelessly to serve Virginia Beach for the last 15 years. He’ll help keep our community safe, go to work for our veterans, and cut costs for working-class families. **The special election to fill my seat in the State Senate is Tuesday, January 10th. **

---
| [For More Information And To Find If You're eligible To Vote, Click Here >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=48b8459587&e=4955722b3e "For More Information And To Find If You're eligible To Vote, Click Here >>>")
---
| **If you’re in Virginia Beach, here’s your early voting information:**
**Virginia Beach Location: Municipal Center, Bldg. 14 - 2449 Princess Anne Road, Virginia Beach, VA. No satellite locations. Friday, January 6th ~ 8:00AM - 5:00PM. Saturday (tomorrow), January 7th ~ 9:00AM - 5:00PM. **

**If you’re in Norfolk, here’s your early voting information:**
**Norfolk Location: 810 Union Street, Suite 100, Norfolk, VA 23510 Friday, January 6th ~ 9:00AM - 5:00PM. Saturday (tomorrow), January 7th ~ 9:00AM - 5:00PM. **

**Tomorrow** is the last day to vote early...! This is sure to be a close race... We only won by one point in 2019, so we need your support. If you’re eligible, make sure you vote for Kevin Adams in this upcoming special election!!
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The woke nonsense happening to our military
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a01f9b45af604a7aa8e3a82e8c860378&_e=hOh-ff3wCY7tK__rK_ElgTXhzFVjxWApU1zWvvYXIH6Rkxvvz5yvbWKhy4vvbSlmOj6UIxK2gRtwWs3625UilgEzMOC_L3dUTjTI1ZL2zkV1PERUtROlw1nUKhjc-Mb9hG7HtO4EleQonV0JzbCANWzmhpRIutEKF7ImnOUL50kd3MENjnMUpiJ4JPIao8nkI7yBJRHLXrVwig3z5dkRHBrd-gyEp3JxggQkeyp52Oziv5jwAxu4j5sKJpIpK58QAychaYmytAZh4tBNmJiqSBUl7C6_rGcJs_4dcSV7MkwQvAtq4UL7QOgBx3RcJH9eQrpbOlSoOIcbey3qSd2GOxxApalZ76tVHNSzjym1Sckt9Zv_cabPSNjtr5Ir2My1)
---
Friend,
---
China’s global secret police has stations operating in America. North Korea has grown its missile program without fear of consequences. Iran continues to move closer to gaining a nuclear bomb. _You know what our military is busy doing?_ **Learning about gender pronouns.** Every moment our military spends on woke indoctrination is a moment taken away from preparing for what actually matters—protecting our country. [**If you think the Left’s woke agenda must end, sign the petition today.**](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a01f9b45af604a7aa8e3a82e8c860378&_e=hOh-ff3wCY7tK__rK_ElgTXhzFVjxWApU1zWvvYXIH6Rkxvvz5yvbWKhy4vvbSlmOj6UIxK2gRtwWs3625UilgEzMOC_L3dUTjTI1ZL2zkV1PERUtROlw1nUKhjc-Mb9hG7HtO4EleQonV0JzbCANWzmhpRIutEKF7ImnOUL50kd3MENjnMUpiJ4JPIao8nkI7yBJRHLXrVwig3z5dkRHBrd-gyEp3JxggQkeyp52OzvlIk-YF0CyUIILbwi1mvRiQJq3lfr9SP4KVniSendB0ebAaWe4uCUj5q8sQS9mqYhkkY-iXQgFe2c1s3Z2SiEPvZW0jKO55ZAKvFr-hU2sqfUkIcq4uTQlC_Mcxv0xX4SoBfghF4gszCGOa0d3QJ0)
---
[**Sign the petition**](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a01f9b45af604a7aa8e3a82e8c860378&_e=hOh-ff3wCY7tK__rK_ElgTXhzFVjxWApU1zWvvYXIH6Rkxvvz5yvbWKhy4vvbSlmOj6UIxK2gRtwWs3625UilgEzMOC_L3dUTjTI1ZL2zkV1PERUtROlw1nUKhjc-Mb9hG7HtO4EleQonV0JzbCANWzmhpRIutEKF7ImnOUL50kd3MENjnMUpiJ4JPIao8nkI7yBJRHLXrVwig3z5dkRHBrd-gyEp3JxggQkeyp52OwGqiWkgqYIEC9Va6YsZ8iOWio2g2nGRKI-WGZJVYbltzLZWmodpXsvouYZ3NIkJtjuyeyDPK7RdEwktM4iFWjvx8udzXC-ejZK8G59nxcqdwmDqMHOhcT38pDHFpt78_gkjlcW27MRjX85OqvpwCNV)
---
Our military should be focused on our national security. Instead:
* Officers receive coaching on sending their soldiers for a “gender transition.”
* The Army is giving training on transgender policy.
* New Air Force Academy materials tell cadets not to use the words “mom and dad” or “boyfriend or girlfriend.”

The U.S. military has spent** __****_more than 6 million man-hours_**** __** training our troops on climate change, white privilege, and the rest of the fanaticism we expect on college campuses—not in our military barracks. **_This is not just silly—it’s reckless._** The world is getting more dangerous by the moment. Our military needs to be rebuilt, not re-educated. clean_body: | | | Friend, China’s global secret police has stations operating in America. North Korea has grown its missile program without fear of consequences. Iran continues to move closer to gaining a nuclear bomb. You know what our military is busy doing? Learning about gender pronouns. Every moment our military spends on woke indoctrination is a moment taken away from preparing for what actually matters—protecting our country. Our military should be focused on our national security. Instead: Officers receive coaching on sending their soldiers for a “gender transition.” The Army is giving training on transgender policy. New Air Force Academy materials tell cadets not to use the words “mom and dad” or “boyfriend or girlfriend.” The U.S. military has spent **more than 6 million man-hours training our troops on climate change, white privilege, and the rest of the fanaticism we expect on college campuses—not in our military barracks. This is not just silly—it’s reckless. The world is getting more dangerous by the moment. Our military needs to be rebuilt, not re-educated. We need leaders who will put an end to the Left’s agenda and focus on what actually matters. - My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. It’s called “If You Want Something Done...” and it profiles bold, courageous women and the lessons they teach us about making a difference, overcoming adversity, and sticking to principle. | | Copyright © 2023 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s not looking good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Now that it’s the new year, we’re taking stock of our resources, updating
our programs, and looking ahead to the rest of the cycle. The most
important piece of that is evaluating our budget and ensuring our
fundraising lines up with our expenses.

Everything that we do here at Justice Democrats is funded by folks just
like you — supporters who believe in our mission to make Congress work for
working people. That’s why we want to share what we’re seeing with you —
it’s not looking good...

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124681?refcode=em20230106-26926&t=1001&akid=26926%2E1203867%2EJSMX7D ]But first, we’re hoping you can spare a moment and a few dollars to
support our candidate recruitment, programs, and campaign strategy for the
2024 cycle. Can you rush $3 today?

We took a look at our fundraising numbers, comparing last month’s results
with 2021:

Time Period Amount

December 2022: $124,748

December 2021: $171,514

Difference: –$46,766

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124681?refcode=em20230106-26926&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26926%2E1203867%2EJSMX7D ]Contribute $3

Peter, in
December 2021, we were way ahead in our fundraising compared to last month
— we can’t allow this trend to continue. We need to make up this $46,766
difference ASAP. We’re being transparent with you in the hopes that you’ll
step in and help us close the gap.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124681?refcode=em20230106-26926&t=1021&akid=26926%2E1203867%2EJSMX7D ]We’re not asking for you to donate any more than you can afford — even
$5 will help us along. Can you pitch in $5 or more so we can get back on
track?

With your support, we can continue to build power, elect people-first
progressives, and transform the Democratic Party. Are you with us?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26926%2E1203867%2EJSMX7D ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26926%2E1203867%2EJSMX7D ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230106-26926-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26926_1203867_JSMX7D&akid=26926%2E1203867%2EJSMX7D

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26926%2E1203867%2EJSMX7D

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Andy Kim
subject: What I'll tell my boys about January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998558/386543118/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389)
---

| | The first time I got home after Jan 6, my then-5 year old son hugged me and asked "Dada, are you ok?" "Why do you ask?" "Did something happen at your work?" I didn't know what to say and never followed up. Two years later, I think I'm ready to talk to him. Here's what I plan to say. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998559/386543119/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) I took him home that night and read Thomas the Tank Engine books, as if all was normal. I kept wondering how he found out. My wife didn't say anything. I'm guessing his teacher or classmates must have. It hurt my heart to think of the terrible example our broken politics sets for our kids. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998560/386543120/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) **It's sad to imagine 5 year olds discussing the horrible actions of adults. What are they saying? What lessons are they learning? But still I struggled to find words to talk to him about what I saw and what happened on Jan 6.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998561/386543121/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) How do I tell my child who learned to scooter rolling down the west hill of the Capitol about people who call themselves patriots that defiled a sacred temple of our democracy? That some colleagues of their father meant to be leaders of this nation instead incited the riot. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998562/386543122/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) How do you tell a child about threats against a Vice President, Speaker, and Members/Senators? That someone planted bombs aiming to assassinate leaders and they still walk among us. That Americans were fighting other Americans in the halls of the United States Capitol. I won't go into all the details with my boys, especially as they are still so little, but I want them to know this isn't normal. They only know a politics of hatred and chaos. It's all they've seen. I worry tremendously that kids will grow up thinking this is just how things are. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998563/386543123/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) I fear we are becoming a nation addicted to anger. My heart hurts for a generation of children raised in a pandemic and surrounded by political vitriol. I cannot perfectly shelter my boys from turbulent times, nor can I just assume they draw the right lessons on their own. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998564/386543124/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) **Since Jan 6, I've made it my life's work now to try and solve one singular question: how do we heal this country? I still believe it's possible, but not guaranteed.** Our problems run deep. We live in the time of greatest amount of distrust in government in our nation's history. But how do we attempt to restore trust in our nation? After Jan 6, I started thinking of this one town hall I did in a deep conservative part of my district. While it was challenging I took questions for three hours and afterwards there was a line of people waiting to talk to me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998565/386543125/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) There was an older man who came up to me. He said "I just want you to know that I didn't vote for you. And frankly I was very hesitant to come today." He paused and I didn't know what he was going to say next. "But I'm glad I did," he said as he shook my hand and walked off. I think about that moment a lot. I don't think I earned his vote or trust just from one encounter, but I think I earned his respect. And that's when it hit me. **You can't gain trust unless you have respect. You won't trust someone if you don't respect them. Respect is key.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998566/386543126/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) As I talk to my boys about Jan 6, I will teach my boys to respect the Capitol. To recognize it's more than just a structure. It is the physical manifestation of Article 1 of our Constitution. To defile and disrespect the Capitol is to defile and disrespect our Constitution. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998567/386543127/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) I will teach my boys that our respect must also extend beyond our institutions and include the people around us. We are struggling from a crisis of empathy as a nation. It's why so many Americans are willing to call each other the enemy. Empathy must flow in all directions. **I will teach my boys that the opposite of democracy is apathy.** It's easy to give into helplessness, or the feeling that our system is too broken to be fixed. Resilience can never be taken for granted. One must have respect for the difficulty of the task at hand and our duty as citizens. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998568/386543128/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) **I will teach my boys about the heroes who refused to run away and instead gave themselves to help others. They are the best of us. It is their story and example that I hope is the most lasting memory of Jan 6. It is their service that makes me most hopeful for America.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998569/386543129/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) I don't have all the answers on how to best talk about Jan 6 and this chaotic moment we live in, but I do know that as a father I can't keep ignoring it with my boys. Kids are perceptive and they soak in far more than we understand. I worry I don't do enough to guide them. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56998570/386543130/2625994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzZjRlYi1mODhkLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdmDMh9C7PM-hiTUKe1CVhMxwEkA-kx9P6uouJgZWo=&emci=1e3d3725-ed8d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=9733f4eb-f88d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=26261389) I will do my best to teach them to love this building as much as I do. I hope my boys and kids around our country will grow up to respect our democracy, respect each other, and respect what it takes to be caretakers of a democracy that is simultaneously powerful and fragile. _Andy_

clean_body: | | | | The first time I got home after Jan 6, my then-5 year old son hugged me and asked "Dada, are you ok?" "Why do you ask?" "Did something happen at your work?" I didn't know what to say and never followed up. Two years later, I think I'm ready to talk to him. Here's what I plan to say. I took him home that night and read Thomas the Tank Engine books, as if all was normal. I kept wondering how he found out. My wife didn't say anything. I'm guessing his teacher or classmates must have. It hurt my heart to think of the terrible example our broken politics sets for our kids. It's sad to imagine 5 year olds discussing the horrible actions of adults. What are they saying? What lessons are they learning? But still I struggled to find words to talk to him about what I saw and what happened on Jan 6. How do I tell my child who learned to scooter rolling down the west hill of the Capitol about people who call themselves patriots that defiled a sacred temple of our democracy? That some colleagues of their father meant to be leaders of this nation instead incited the riot. How do you tell a child about threats against a Vice President, Speaker, and Members/Senators? That someone planted bombs aiming to assassinate leaders and they still walk among us. That Americans were fighting other Americans in the halls of the United States Capitol. I won't go into all the details with my boys, especially as they are still so little, but I want them to know this isn't normal. They only know a politics of hatred and chaos. It's all they've seen. I worry tremendously that kids will grow up thinking this is just how things are. I fear we are becoming a nation addicted to anger. My heart hurts for a generation of children raised in a pandemic and surrounded by political vitriol. I cannot perfectly shelter my boys from turbulent times, nor can I just assume they draw the right lessons on their own. Since Jan 6, I've made it my life's work now to try and solve one singular question: how do we heal this country? I still believe it's possible, but not guaranteed. Our problems run deep. We live in the time of greatest amount of distrust in government in our nation's history. But how do we attempt to restore trust in our nation? After Jan 6, I started thinking of this one town hall I did in a deep conservative part of my district. While it was challenging I took questions for three hours and afterwards there was a line of people waiting to talk to me. There was an older man who came up to me. He said "I just want you to know that I didn't vote for you. And frankly I was very hesitant to come today." He paused and I didn't know what he was going to say next. "But I'm glad I did," he said as he shook my hand and walked off. I think about that moment a lot. I don't think I earned his vote or trust just from one encounter, but I think I earned his respect. And that's when it hit me. You can't gain trust unless you have respect. You won't trust someone if you don't respect them. Respect is key. As I talk to my boys about Jan 6, I will teach my boys to respect the Capitol. To recognize it's more than just a structure. It is the physical manifestation of Article 1 of our Constitution. To defile and disrespect the Capitol is to defile and disrespect our Constitution. I will teach my boys that our respect must also extend beyond our institutions and include the people around us. We are struggling from a crisis of empathy as a nation. It's why so many Americans are willing to call each other the enemy. Empathy must flow in all directions. I will teach my boys that the opposite of democracy is apathy. It's easy to give into helplessness, or the feeling that our system is too broken to be fixed. Resilience can never be taken for granted. One must have respect for the difficulty of the task at hand and our duty as citizens. I will teach my boys about the heroes who refused to run away and instead gave themselves to help others. They are the best of us. It is their story and example that I hope is the most lasting memory of Jan 6. It is their service that makes me most hopeful for America. I don't have all the answers on how to best talk about Jan 6 and this chaotic moment we live in, but I do know that as a father I can't keep ignoring it with my boys. Kids are perceptive and they soak in far more than we understand. I worry I don't do enough to guide them. I will do my best to teach them to love this building as much as I do. I hope my boys and kids around our country will grow up to respect our democracy, respect each other, and respect what it takes to be caretakers of a democracy that is simultaneously powerful and fragile. Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Last year showed the nation just how critical Democratic leadership at the state level can be – abortion access, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are being decided in state legislatures across the country. **That’s why we’re reaching out to you today.**
Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the _best_ step you can take to help build a better future in the states.

clean_body: We’ll be frank – we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023. | | | | | We can’t believe it: 3,961 Democrats have already renewed their 2023 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the best step you can take to help build a better future in the states. | Team,

Earlier this week, we celebrated something that hasn’t occurred since the 1970s – Democrats holding the offices of Governor, Secretary of State and Attorney General all at the same time.

But that’s exactly where we’re at right now with Governor Katie Hobbs, Secretary of State Adrian Fontes and Attorney General Kris Mayes.

It’s a reason for celebration – but also a reason for us to stay alert. The AZ GOP responded poorly to their recent defeats, in multiple ways. We know that means when the legislative session starts on Monday, they’ll try everything they can to negate our successes.

That’s why we have to fight back, and make sure we support Gov. Hobbs, Secretary Fontes, and Attorney General Mayes in their efforts to make Arizona a better place for all Arizonans.

clean_body: | | | Help us support Hobbs, Fontes and Mayes. | | | Team, Earlier this week, we celebrated something that hasn’t occurred since the 1970s – Democrats holding the offices of Governor, Secretary of State and Attorney General all at the same time. But that’s exactly where we’re at right now with Governor Katie Hobbs, Secretary of State Adrian Fontes and Attorney General Kris Mayes. It’s a reason for celebration – but also a reason for us to stay alert. The AZ GOP responded poorly to their recent defeats, in multiple ways. We know that means when the legislative session starts on Monday, they’ll try everything they can to negate our successes. That’s why we have to fight back, and make sure we support Gov. Hobbs, Secretary Fontes, and Attorney General Mayes in their efforts to make Arizona a better place for all Arizonans. name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjfn7l7etf5ol0odsd8ugb5u9j2kpbjsidimsum0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc54lss1lq5j628978g7nkvhuan5s662tkirn738_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)

**This is my story.**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zncmpjbuinhm4ljqj9r1brdvoaju7oim6or26dl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1hrv1f1i3uobjdvsupf2himc9tnl49fuod8po8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)

That's why I'm asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc9p054kmuciiu1hlcqgsnjodqahajvplrs1snn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze6ee08o7asfnsctb2170jbpd5djg8rcgegbgato_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5t8c3kch66ps5e1pqvn581jhqkc6rmi2053ss28_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdff5grhl2gou7rn7ngd2qbve0cmrpjr50bk1br8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv8heik6blkfqltgf5hcn7n98ob8gmbgfr4ch128_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjr1fmfm056ui9524ehs44mn2r8ev4j8gi7clrco_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztmscaj9b7cq5g3f509elo95pioicpfgmt2ql0h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z925ls31dpvbj3lmh1qv9ppo2lueleg3j8juhmu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkr4bu2p9bm3ppqi77f0079r6j79l0mfn79d6958_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp5tn7hsfioj68jfe5ch02okoijm5i5028bckjvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1im4pr0cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, today is the two-year anniversary of the January 6th insurrection; one of the darkest days in American history. Two years since we watched white supremacist, MAGA loyalists violently overthrow our nation’s capital and threaten our democracy. | In conjunction with this solemn anniversary, we spent the majority of this week watching chaos unfold in Congress: Peter, the GOP has proved time and time again that they are unfit to govern themselves, nonetheless our nation. It’s never been more apparent that we need Democratic leaders who will get to work on day one instead of promoting utter pandemonium. The Collective PAC supports Black candidates like Hakeem Jeffries, Raphael Warnock, and more who are doing just that. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: BREAKING: A Leftist Is Running Against Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
Democrats would love nothing more than to take back Missouri| | | |
---
_**BREAKING: 2024 LEFT-WING ACTIVIST ANNOUNCES CANDIDACY**_
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e7aa4e05ff264775ab0d3ff3ca21ebcd&_e=hHu8ou6cUcSLxsZfbirpaX8_UdOevvOtfkFd2Lj98RDpPm5fI6ZDKG90eIoiU8-pP39m0ptt68fdFPgxiBRN94RrmNuCtrY5SBO9W5C2zFcW9iBIh9WCVU65L53TKYmFVHr1BxysIhMZx9Q6HTtBpg_h_I1FaiW3t-yeonBmZWiQ3s0CIPLHUwh5JUkmkWqMk9_6ejjlxXMe6TKkmd2Dpds5GuaP5xwRj4OKPbnh16emyFZ5_zYzbwl6ziKXRtKpcnSolbZNty6LzDAzEmn5OrIc3zEwUqtZtyojVT3BDYejB9rmLHiDn7EICr5WQb5uIclQ4nHZDsivPHAUeBLfgmKK9XAHgBhgTtAhJH8WVSjbfKN25eBnCqMAqMPkTxFD)
---
Peter,
---
A left-wing activist just announced a candidacy against me. It was only a matter of time... I've never been afraid of a fight— the fate of our nation is too important. **_Will you stand with me?_**
---
[**RUSH A CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTION >>> **](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e7aa4e05ff264775ab0d3ff3ca21ebcd&_e=hHu8ou6cUcSLxsZfbirpaX8_UdOevvOtfkFd2Lj98RDpPm5fI6ZDKG90eIoiU8-pP39m0ptt68fdFPgxiBRN94RrmNuCtrY5SBO9W5C2zFcW9iBIh9WCVU65L53TKYmFVHr1BxysIhMZx9Q6HTtBpg_h_I1FaiW3t-yeonBmZWiQ3s0CIPLHUwh5JUkmkWqMk9_6ejjlxXMe6TKkmd2Dpds5GuaP5xwRj4OKPbnh16f2khF4OMyANO23ElFlE6ticaKHl0wHTf68k5XxHqi9KFiuzlHIMWxmoQMFdHPNMjnsHYZJ5Q7lyVUIQfPL0mn6BSsy4Yqd0Tc_k0fG2ooJJg0eaiEjr3KPVLO4WL69eFVAGkWMAFPQ8MB2zgcEmrQI)
---
Ever since I was first elected to the Senate, the left has tried to destroy me. The Democrat party, Silicon Valley, woke corporations, and the mainstream media would _ALL _like to see me fail. Why? Because they are threatened by my record of holding the powerful **_ACCOUNTABLE_**!! I will continue to put conservative policies into action, fighting for ALL Americans, not just the coastal elitists who are used to calling the shots.
---
[**JOIN THE 2024 TEAM >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e7aa4e05ff264775ab0d3ff3ca21ebcd&_e=hHu8ou6cUcSLxsZfbirpaX8_UdOevvOtfkFd2Lj98RDpPm5fI6ZDKG90eIoiU8-pP39m0ptt68fdFPgxiBRN94RrmNuCtrY5SBO9W5C2zFcW9iBIh9WCVU65L53TKYmFVHr1BxysIhMZx9Q6HTtBpg_h_I1FaiW3t-yeonBmZWiQ3s0CIPLHUwh5JUkmkWqMk9_6ejjlxXMe6TKkmd2Dpds5GuaP5xwRj4OKPbnh16dZMgPoyklqjPtOxAZyrMHLB5_LUS_Cw5NH-RazlR2Hu_hZFtR6pD2XXnHXIcKKmPcVMVrRh0cG7kljvXUeDBmIa5XsAwahI3A7osJu7B08BJ4CFPJ1-J11j7MQxbRzpwFpvCgoDz-1EJGVvKFk7Z3e)
---
The stakes are just too high. Democrats have sent our great country into a tailspin, and they would love nothing more than to take back Missouri. We CAN'T let that happen. And with your help, we won't!
---
[**HELP HOLD THE LINE IN MISSOURI >>> **](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e7aa4e05ff264775ab0d3ff3ca21ebcd&_e=hHu8ou6cUcSLxsZfbirpaX8_UdOevvOtfkFd2Lj98RDpPm5fI6ZDKG90eIoiU8-pP39m0ptt68fdFPgxiBRN94RrmNuCtrY5SBO9W5C2zFcW9iBIh9WCVU65L53TKYmFVHr1BxysIhMZx9Q6HTtBpg_h_I1FaiW3t-yeonBmZWiQ3s0CIPLHUwh5JUkmkWqMk9_6ejjlxXMe6TKkmd2Dpds5GuaP5xwRj4OKPbnh16d6tKnXY5kctzayVfQv10qlNFSm0hcCR1ImR3AdxDgNk3zscOk_5mHEe_ITQalPcstVBtzMWD_Q6aSV9-OB1lnds9PD9XR6UrbIHJNfpmhJMrHA7yVvXgRW5rmREZf5Qhw9K-AZK3-2ksXkWUMTLtUB)
---
God Bless,
---
---
Josh Hawley
---

body:
Please, update your membership before midnight!
| | | **ALERT: We need 100 Democrats in Pennsylvania to activate their membership in the first 100 days of the new Congress -- _but we’re already falling behind!_**

**SUGGESTED GIFT: $5**

**[Please activate your membership by midnight to get us back on track to defend our Senate majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11457?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230106-MembershipAlert-First100DaysMembership-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230106-MembershipAlert-First100DaysMembership-ETG-sl1&akid=9397%2E9716520%2ElViZrW)**
**[Activate My Membership](https://go.dscc.org/go/11457?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230106-MembershipAlert-First100DaysMembership-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230106-MembershipAlert-First100DaysMembership-ETG-sl1&akid=9397%2E9716520%2ElViZrW)**
---

Team -- This grassroots team made history in 2020 when we flipped the Senate blue, and we did it AGAIN in 2022 by EXPANDING our _razor-thin_ Senate majority -- **and now President Biden needs your help to protect our hard-won progress in 2024.**

Democrats won last time because we invested early, hit every key goal, and NEVER gave up in the face of Mitch McConnell's megadonor machine. **That’s why it’s _crucial_ that we meet our goal of activating 100 memberships in Pennsylvania in the first 100 days of the new Congress.**

President Biden is counting on us to hit this goal so we can send a BIG message that Democrats are ready to win again, but we all have to come together. **So please, before midnight:**

**[Activate your DSCC membership to help reach our MUST-HIT goal and defend our Democratic Senate >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11457?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230106-MembershipAlert-First100DaysMembership-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230106-MembershipAlert-First100DaysMembership-ETG-sl1&akid=9397%2E9716520%2ElViZrW)**

Team DSCC

name: Heather (via Voter Protection Project)
subject: On this day two years ago:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
January 6th shook this nation to its very core
| Hey, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project.

Today marks **two years** since the events of January 6, 2021 – _a day that shook this nation’s foundations to its very core._

**Two years** since the violent, treasonous, Trump-incited insurrection on the Capitol.

**Two years** since Trump’s followers nearly overthrew the democratic, historic proceedings certifying the results of President Biden’s win.

_Yet, two years later, MAGA Republicans still hold seats in Congress – and now, an outright majority in our House of Representatives._

[Here at Voter Protection Project we’re committed to holding these Republican traitors accountable, protecting voting rights, and taking back our House majority – but we can’t do it without you. Please, on this anniversary of January 6, commit to defending democracy by chipping in $6 today »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38077?t=6&akid=5976%2E878179%2EsFTeqL) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $6 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38078?t=7&akid=5976%2E878179%2EsFTeqL)
---
